Ardent Class.name: 炽念使 Ardent
Ardent Class.description:
Role: 。你让盟友的内心充满了战意和对胜利的渴望。当你攻击时，你尽情地释放着炽烈的情感，宣述着直白的真理。根据你所选择的职业特性，你的第二职位倾向于防御者或打击者。

Power Source: 。你是一名长于心灵力量的战士，你用如同漩涡一般的思想之力去侵蚀和干扰你的敌人，并让盟友充满信心。

Key Abilities: 魅力，体质，感知

Armor Proficiencies: 布甲，皮甲，革甲，链甲

Weapon Proficiencies: 简易近战，军用近战，简易远程

Bonus to Defense: +1强韧，+1意志

Hit Points at 1st Level: 12 + 体质值

Hit Points per Level Gained: 5

Healing Surges per Day: 7 + 体质调整值

Trained Skills: 1级时，从下列职业技能列表中，选择4个受训技能。

Class Skills: 神秘(Int)、运动(Str)、唬骗(Cha)、交涉(Cha)、坚韧(Con)、医疗(Wis)、洞察(Wis)、威吓(Cha)、市井(Cha)

 

「世界之命运寄宿于激情之火焰。」

Those who let their base emotions rule them invite madness and destruction. Prolonged feelings of fear, greed, lust, or hatred can weaken the mind's defenses against manipulation. Wielding psionic power, you excite such emotions in your enemies, creating gaps in their defenses and frustrating their attacks, all while filling your allies with encouraging thoughts and guarding them against despair and other negative emotions.

Ardents rarely learn their art through formal training. In many ways, they are incidental leaders, having stumbled onto psionic power at some point earlier in their lives. How you discovered your psionic talent can shape how you wield this power now. You might have awakened to your talent in the heat of battle, experiencing a mental breakthrough that allowed you to augment your attacks by rending your enemies' minds. Or your friends might reflect your power when your mood bleeds into theirs, altering their emotional states to match your own. Regardless of the revelation, you learned to harness this power to support your fighting prowess and to guide your allies to victory.

炽念使简介

角色特性: You lead your group from the front lines, mixing strong melee attacks with equally strong mental assaults. Your strikes can dismantle your enemies' defenses and make them more vulnerable to your allies' attacks. In addition, you can provoke allies to perform daring stunts and maneuvers, helping them gain better positions, leap across the battlefield to close with distant foes, or shrug off deadly afflictions.

信仰: Ardents gravitate toward wild and unpredictable gods, favoring those who represent war or wilderness. Kord and Melora are the most popular, with more independent ardents following Avandra. Evil ardents find much to like in Bane and Gruumsh.

种族: Humans, half-elves, and kalashtar are the most common ardents, though dragonborn, halflings, gnomes, and tieflings also excel in this class, having the natural charisma needed to focus their inner strength.

 

炽念使职业特性

炽念使具有下列职业特性。

炽念护罩 Ardent Mantle

A person's state of mind can be armor against the decay and madness born from base emotions, and thus ardents gird themselves by donning particular mindsets to ward off the perils brought on by fear, despair, and hatred. Various emotional states, called mantles, can safeguard the mind. Ardents most commonly use the mantles of clarity and elation.

在以下选项中选择一个，以获得相应的威能使你和队友获益。

明晰护罩 Mantle of Clarity: 你和所有离你5格内的盟友在对抗借机攻击的所有防御上获得等同于你感知调整值的加值。

另外，离你5格内的每个盟友的在洞察和侦查检定上获得+2加值。

你同时获得@UUID[Compendium.dnd-4e-compendium.module-powers.rfviGYe4uA0WlRE1]{炽念活力 Ardent Alacrity}威能。

快意护罩 Mantle of Elation: 你和所有离你5格内的盟友在借机攻击的伤害骰上获得等同于你体质调整值的加值。

另外，离你5格内的每个盟友在交涉和威吓检定上获得+2加值。

你同时获得@UUID[Compendium.dnd-4e-compendium.module-powers.HvwN6py8YZUtCn7k]{炽念之怒 Ardent Outrage}威能。

冲动护罩 Mantle of Impulsiveness（PsP）: 当一个离你5格内的盟友成为借机攻击的目标时，该盟友在伤害骰上获得等同于你体质调整值的威能加值，直到他下一回合结束。

另外，离你5格内的每个盟友在坚韧和威吓检定上获得+2加值。

你同时获得@UUID[Compendium.dnd-4e-compendium.module-powers.Psd0F2R5x8M1Q4zy]{炽念爆发 Ardent Eruption}威能。

炽念汹涌 Ardent Surge

你获得@UUID[Compendium.dnd-4e-compendium.module-powers.tiTRAzheoj3x9rqO]{炽念汹涌 Ardent Surge}威能。你激昂的情绪状态能够鼓舞人心，激励你的盟友且帮助他们从伤势中恢复。

灵能强化 Psionic Augmentation

通过训练和谨慎的研究，你已经掌握了比其他角色掌控的威能更具灵活性的一种灵能魔法。你了解一大堆随意威能，你可以随意注入不等量的灵能之力来引导威能。你将灵能之力导入个人的灵能池中——在游戏中以灵能点表示——凭借于此，你可以用于强化你的随意攻击威能，以此代替其他角色使用的遭遇威能。

由于这种特殊的职业特性，你获得和使用威能的方式与其他大多数职业的方式有微小的区别。

随意攻击威能： 1级时，你从你的职业选择两个随意攻击威能和一个每日攻击威能，但你没有从这个职业获得任何遭遇攻击威能。相对的，你可以使用灵能点来强化你的职业随意攻击威能。这些威能都有可强化关键字。

当你升级时，你从职业中获得新的随意攻击威能而不是新的遭遇攻击威能。3级时，你从这个职业中选择一个新的随意攻击威能。在7，13，17，23和27级时，你可以用一个与你同等级或更低级的随意攻击威能来替换你当前的一个随意攻击威能。这些威能必须都是可强化威能，而且属于这个职业。

灵能点: 在起始时，你有2个灵能点。在3，7，17，21，23，27级时，你获得额外2个灵能点。在13级时，你获得额外1个灵能点。如果你从其他来源获得灵能点（例如你的典范之道），则将它们加到你的灵能点总数上。你可以用你的灵能点来强化你拥有的任何可强化威能，无论你是怎么获得这个威能的。

在一个短休息或长休息后，你恢复所有的灵能点。

 

炽念使威能

When you use your ardent disciplines, you transmit your thoughts and emotions to those around you. These sensations bleed into nearby creatures, either filling them with despair and pain or hope and vigor. Your powers are accompanied by visual signs, contained in a sudden corona of light that swirls out from your head and flares around you. The light's color reflects your mood, with brilliant scarlet flashes representing anger; green, health and vigor; black, fear and death; and so on. When you augment your powers by spending power points, the corona intensifies.

Assassin Class.name: 刺客 Assassin
Assassin Class.description:
Role: 。你是夜晚的鬼影和风中的轻鸣。障碍在你眼中不值一提，突然而精确的攻击助你解决敌人。你的第二职位倾向于控制者。

Power Source: 。你的灵魂与堕影冥界相连使你成为黑暗的生物。

Key Abilities: 敏捷，魅力，体质

Armor Proficiencies: 布甲，皮甲；轻盾

Weapon Proficiencies: 简易单手近战，军用重刃，军用轻刃，简易远程

Implement: 气印，擅长武器

Bonus to Defense: +1强韧，+1意志

Hit Points at 1st Level: 10 + 体质值

Hit Points per Level Gained: 4

Healing Surges per Day: 6 + 体质调整值

Trained Skills: 隐秘。1级时，从下列职业技能列表中，再选择4个受训技能。

Class Skills: 杂技(Dex)，神秘(Int)，运动(Str)，唬骗(Cha)，坚韧(Con)，洞察(WiS)，侦查(WiS)，隐秘(Dex)，市井(Cha)，贼活(Dex)

 

「当你看到我时，你已无暇拯救自己。」

Few creatures embrace shadow magic without both a compelling reason and a measure of desperation. Not many visit the Shadowfell willingly, let alone pledge a shard of their souls to it. Yet that is exactly what assassins, and other practitioners of shadow magic, do to gain their power.

As an assassin, you cede a portion of yourself to the Shadowfell, replacing a fundamental part of your being with a dark reflection of your true self. At times, you can manifest this twisted image in place of your body so that you can face attacks with little cause for concern. Also, the infusion of shadow magic allows you to spot the weakest points in a victim's defenses. With a few moments of study, you can reduce even the stoutest warrior to a corpse.

If others know that you are an assassin, you might find that few trust you. In some civilized realms, the study of shadow magic and assassination is banned on pain of death. In the past, and as a response to the outcry against them, assassins formed coteries, or guilds, of like-minded slayers, and each one delves into the study of shadow magic and develops unique methods of killing. A guild provides you with a measure of protection, and its grandmasters expect obedience and fealty. The wars between guilds, and the struggles within them, might never spill into mass battles, but they still leave dozens of slain folk in their wake.

As an assassin, you are an outcast. You traded away part of your soul for the power of death. Perhaps you seek justice against a powerful enemy, or maybe you had no other way to preserve yourself in the face of a bleak, uncaring world. Whatever drew you onto the assassin's path, you are an avatar of death and a trained killer from whom few can escape unharmed.

刺客简介

角色特性: You can turn into an insubstantial creature of shadow. While you are in that form, even the most alert sentinel can overlook your approach, and attacks pass through you with little harm. When you spot your target, you study its weaknesses as you prepare to deliver a killing blow.

信仰: Assassins who pursue evil creatures are often worshipers of the Raven Queen, who teaches that death is the great leveler, a tool the world needs to end abuses by powerful beings. Evil assassins wallow in the misery and fear they cause, or they revel in performing an exquisite kill. Such folk usually venerate Zehir or Lolth.

种族: Revenants have the combination of implacability and physical ability needed to flourish as assassins. Half-orcs also excel as assassins, often having a brutish nature that makes the assassin's art palatable to them. Drow are superlative assassins, both because they grow up in a society that values skilled murder and because they are comfortable with working in darkness. Halflings make good assassins since they can combine their natural stealthiness with a native curiosity that makes hiding from them difficult. Changeling assassins possess an unsurpassed ability to infiltrate and kill from a position of trust.

 

刺客职业特性

刺客具有下列职业特性。

刺客寿衣 Assassin's Shroud

你获得@UUID[Compendium.dnd-4e-compendium.module-powers.evmd1YQPrqU3RGW5]{刺客寿衣 Assassin's Shroud}威能。这种来自于堕影冥界的黑暗魔法流淌在你的血脉之中，污染了你的灵魂，但也给予了你一项能力：使你的敌人穿上隐形的寿衣，将弱点暴露出来。目标被越多层的寿衣所包裹，那你对他的一击将越发致命。

公会训练 Guild Training

刺客从特定公会中接受训练获得他们的能力。即便他由某独立导师教导成人，他所获得的技艺也必来自于某一工会的研究。

刺客的公会坐落于城镇或其它他们中意的地方。没有加入公会的刺客如想提高自己的技艺必须先得到当地刺客大师的首肯。在一些地方，尤其是那些拥有很多潜在势力的大城市中，两个公会会为控制当地的杀人生意而互相争斗。在那种情况下，你必须在公会中选一边，否则就要面对两个公会的怒火。

从下列选项中选择一个。它将带给你如下描述的增益，同时也给一些刺客威能提供增益，具体见威能描述。

阴冷学徒 Bleak Disciple: 当你命中一个非重伤的目标时，你获得等同于你体质调整值的临时生命值。此临时生命值在11级时增加2点，21级时增加4点。

夜行刺客 Night Stalker: 当你的目标不邻近你的敌人时，你在对它的伤害骰上获得等同于你魅力调整值的加值。

行刑者公会 Executioner's Guild（Dragon #400）: 你获得@UUID[Compendium.dnd-4e-compendium.module-powers.WZ68JDhKx3FqfTsI]{刺客打击 Assassin's Strike}威能。你不会获得刺客遭遇攻击威能。

阴影形态 Shade Form

你获得@UUID[Compendium.dnd-4e-compendium.module-powers.8MrY6C7Zwz3kBWKi]{阴影形态 Shade Form}威能。当你将你的部分灵魂献给堕影冥界时，来自于黑暗国度的力量充满了你的物质形态。因此，你可以转为阴影形态来使你横跨障碍，避开原本你难以避开的敌人。

当你进入这种形态时，你变得模糊，你的皮肤成了灰色，你身上的穿戴和所有装备变成其近似的黯晦色彩。你的双眼失去瞳孔，变得一片空白。你在恢复原本形态前无法伤害你的敌人。

你可以选择@UUID[Compendium.dnd-4e-compendium.module-powers.badZChr6getEJjcy]{影焰形态 Black Flame Form}来替换@UUID[Compendium.dnd-4e-compendium.module-powers.8MrY6C7Zwz3kBWKi]{阴影形态 Shade Form}威能

影步 Shadow Step

你获得@UUID[Compendium.dnd-4e-compendium.module-powers.XFezy9jNfVdPkLbR]{影步 Shadow Step}威能。暗影能量会缠绕着每个轻微触碰过堕影冥界的生物，因为死亡国度是每个生物的最终归宿。你具有的能力使你能从一个生物的阴影通道走到另一个生物

 

刺客威能

Your powers are called hexes. They draw on your shadowed soul to enhance your combat techniques or harm your enemies directly. You can use shadows as distractions, weapons, and secret paths to destroy your enemies.

Assassin (Executioner) Class.name: 刺客 Assassin (Executioner)
Assassin (Executioner) Class.description:
Role: 。你对时机的把握、武器的技巧和将暗影作为武器的能力使你能以致命的效果对一个不明真相的敌人进行打击。你在适当的时候甚至会混入一些暗影魔法。

Power Source:

Key Abilities: 敏捷，魅力

Armor Proficiencies: 布甲，皮甲

Weapon Proficiencies: 简易单手近战，军用单手近战，绞索，简易远程，吹箭筒，流星索，短弓

Implement: 气印

Bonus to Defense: +1强韧，+1意志

Hit Points at 1st Level: 12 + 体质值

Hit Points per Level Gained: 5

Healing Surges per Day: 7 + 体质调整值

Trained Skills: 隐秘。1级时，从下列职业技能列表中，再选择4个受训技能。

Class Skills: 杂技(Dex)、神秘(Int)、运动(Str)、唬骗(Cha)、坚韧(Con)、洞察(Wis)、威吓(Cha)、侦查(Wis)、隐秘(Dex)、市井(Cha)、贼活(Dex)

 

属于刺客 Assassin的一种

行刑者不仅是被雇佣的杀手。当有人想通过暗杀来传递某种讯息时，让行刑者安排一场死刑也许是最高效的传递方式。比如毒死一名奸商以警告其他商人公平交易,或者公开处死一名暴君的，已警告地区的其他领导者不要要对人民残酷压榨。虽然许多行刑者是被第三方指派，但也有行刑者处于某种个人目的，如锄强扶弱。

行刑者擅长渗透和暗杀。他们钻研暗影魔法,这使他们可以穿墙入室，凭空消失；他们也精通用毒，这使他们既可以直接也可以间接的暗杀敌人。

作为冒险者，行刑者通常执行队伍目标里的暗杀任务，通过暗杀以影响队伍的盟友和敌人。即使非暗杀任务中，行刑者也可以担当称职的战士。这些特长对那些倒处惹是生非的冒险团队伍来说是笔不可多得的资产。

 

刺客公会 Assassins' Guild

当你创建你的刺客角色时，你必须选择你所属的公会。行刑者可从下列公会选择一个：血红正义，低语联盟，忍者之道（Dragon #404）。你选择的公会决定了一些你的武器擅长和你的职业生涯里掌握的特殊攻击技巧

血红正义 Red Scales

此公会的刺客致力于保持社会的平衡。如果任何机构成长得太强大，太腐朽，太富裕，或太邪恶，则血红正义公会将衡量这个机构的成员，然后索取他们欠下的血债报酬。尽管有人可能会说血红正义是群理想主义者，但没人能说出真正驱使他们的是什么。传言说这个公会的创始刺客被一些位面实体接触过。他们说在他从遥远东方的旅途归来后，他获得了冒着金色火焰的眼球，以及他的新规则

低语联盟 League of Whispers

此公会的存在常被认为是神话或都市传说而被无视。低语联盟的将成员作为秘密保守着。尽管个别成员可能作为刺客十分有名，但他们与此公会的关联外人无从得知。联盟通过处决任何发现这个事实的人来保证公会的秘密存在。公会每到满月便秘密举行一次集会，成员汇集于此讨论工作，交换秘密和技巧，也从他们的创始人处接受任务

忍者之道 Way of the Ninja（Dragon #404）

忍者之道教导秘诀即是力量。使用你了解的秘诀以出其不意的方式进行打击。利用你所了解的一切来击败目标和完成任务。即使付出生命也要保全组织秘密的安全。近中远结合型的武器保证你的战斗没有死角，你绝不会像你的对手那样措手不及

 

 

1级：多才防御 Versatile Defense

Ever watchful, an executioner practices techniques for staying alive. You have learned a mode of defense tailored to your fighting style.

Benefit: 你选择一个额外专长：盾牌擅长：轻盾 Shield Proficiency: Light或双武器防御 Two-Weapon Defense。你不需要满足此专长的前提条件

1级：攻击娴熟 Attack Finesse

For the executioner, speed, agility, and precision are more important than muscle. An executioner learns how to handle any weapon with a finesse that lends itself to more accurate strikes.

Benefit: 你可以使用敏捷代替力量用于你的近战基本攻击

另外，每回合一次，你使用单手武器，绞索，吹箭筒或短弓进行的武器攻击能造成1d8额外伤害。此额外伤害11级时为2d8，21级时为3d8

1级：公会攻击 Guild Attacks

作为公会的一员，你已经习得了多种致命的攻击技巧。在你的职业生涯开始时，你可以使用与你的公会相关联的技巧

血红正义 Red Scales

血红正义被认为是贴身鏖战大师。公会成员在武技和暗杀技巧上浸淫了数十年，将他们徒手，匕首，绞索的运用达到一个新的境界

Benefit: 你获得@UUID[Compendium.dnd-4e-compendium.module-powers.Cy4glf0TJazOQNoI]{绞索扼杀 Garrote Strangle}，@UUID[Compendium.dnd-4e-compendium.module-powers.WOSBuzo9NcmrKewp]{淬毒匕首 Poisoned Dagger}，和@UUID[Compendium.dnd-4e-compendium.module-powers.RSvzITDQmUhFc37d]{疾速飞扑 Quick Lunge}威能

低语联盟 League of Whispers

低语联盟专精于多种远程武器的运用。这些训练使他们能以特殊技巧处决目标或者从当地执法者受里逃脱。联盟成员经过流星索，手弩，吹箭筒的训练，可以适应远近战斗。和其他行刑者一样，联盟成员通常携带多种武器在战斗里灵活运用

Benefit: 你获得@UUID[Compendium.dnd-4e-compendium.module-powers.6asx4D7ClBKJMrPt]{流星索击倒 Bola Takedown}，@UUID[Compendium.dnd-4e-compendium.module-powers.85yS2fv4KJoMzik3]{精准飞镖 Precision Dart}，和@UUID[Compendium.dnd-4e-compendium.module-powers.WrFJEAt4k3PsYOoj]{快速射击 Quick Shot}威能

忍者之道 Way of the Ninja（Dragon #404）

Benefit: 你获得@UUID[Compendium.dnd-4e-compendium.module-powers.ywxuAn09bQBNYtM5]{忍者急袭 Ninja-to Rush}，@UUID[Compendium.dnd-4e-compendium.module-powers.Jjh7tay5QAlGzkbO]{淬毒手里剑 Poisonous Shuriken}，和@UUID[Compendium.dnd-4e-compendium.module-powers.ztfP5hrV12IyDaGn]{旋转锁镰 Whirling Kusari-gama}威能

另外，你获得手里剑和锁镰的擅长，你的「攻击娴熟」职业特性也对手里剑和锁镰生效，适用于弹药上的刺客毒药也能给手里剑使用

1级：刺客打击 Assassin's Strike

The heart of the executioner's ability to take down a foe is the assassin's strike technique. An executioner often has only one chance to eliminate an enemy. Once the element of surprise is lost, bodyguards (or even targets themselves, if capable) can interfere with the mission, leaving the target regretfully alive. This powerful technique represents the intersection of the assassin's knowledge of vital areas of the body, extreme mastery of weapons, and ability to throw everything he has into a single formidable attack. The executioner must wait for the exact right moment to strike, but when he does, this attack can slay a target instantly.

Benefit: 你获得@UUID[Compendium.dnd-4e-compendium.module-powers.WZ68JDhKx3FqfTsI]{刺客打击 Assassin's Strike}威能

1级：快速易武 Quick Swap

Your weapons are extensions of your body. When you are changing your focus from nearby foes to distant enemies, you can switch between your melee and ranged weapons with ease.

Benefit: 每个你的回合一次，你能以一个自由动作来抽出或收起一件武器然后抽出另一件武器

1级：用毒 Poison Use

Executioners have a long history with poison. All become masters at mixing their own poisons. For most assassins, poison is only one of their many weapons. Most of the poisons used by executioners are merely the set-up for a later attack, a precursor to ensure that the target won't be able to stop the executioner once the assassination attempt begins in earnest.

Many poisons are outlawed in civilized realms, so executioners learn to craft simple, unstable venoms that quickly break down into inert components. In this manner, an assassin can travel with a seemingly innocent array of materials. When it is time to strike, the executioner quickly crafts a poison as needed. Because the poison is unstable, it decays rapidly and leaves no incriminating evidence if unused. A shrewd executioner can maintain an innocent facade even in the face of a thorough search of his or her person and quarters.

Benefit: 你习得2个你选择的1级刺客毒药的配方。在一次长休息中，你可以准备一瓶1级刺客毒药

你必须了解此毒药的配方且拥有用毒者工具包。这瓶包含了此毒药单次使用的剂量，如果在你下一次长休息前它仍未使用，则它失效。一个物品一次只能从一个刺客毒药的效果获得增益

只有你能使用刺客毒药，且你对你创造的刺客毒药的效果免疫

血根毒 Bloodroot Poison

The poison created from the oil of the bloodroot plant causes a temporary fever and weakening of the body. Bloodroot (named for the deep crimson color of the root) is a relatively common plant often mistaken for other, harmless plants that grow nearby. The poison is favored by assassins who seek to knock an enemy off balance and disorient it before the lethal strike.

食腐虫脑汁 Carrion Crawler Brain Juice

Carrion crawler brain juice is exactly what its name claims: a poison derived from the brains of vicious carrion crawlers, which makes it a difficult substance to harvest. Carrion crawler brain juice makes the body of the target sluggish as the poison attacks muscles and essential tissues that help the body move. Longer exposure to brain juice causes a form of paralysis that makes it impossible for the victim to move a significant distance.

绿血油 Greenblood Oil

Named for its color and thickness, greenblood oil is a viscous poison derived from poisonous plants that grow deep in primeval forests. This combination of oils from several different sources has medicinal uses: It breaks up dangerous blood clots and can be used to help drain infections from the body. Assassins, however, use greenblood oil to make it more difficult for the body to heal. This poison is often used to make a target more vulnerable to harm rather than by harming directly. For example, an assassin might pour greenblood oil over a target's food early in the day before performing a very public assassination, to ensure that the victim cannot be magically healed once the attack takes place.

原质苔粉 Id Moss Powder

Id moss grows primarily in caves and crevasses in the earth, particularly in places where the sun never reaches. Most forestdwelling people know to avoid consuming id moss even in desperate situations, because the moss causes mental trauma and eventually insanity. When crushed into a fine powder, id moss powder can be inhaled, allowing it to attack the mind more quickly.

耐萨瑞毒 Nitharit Poison

One of the few slow-acting poisons in the assassin's repertoire, nitharit poison gradually breaks down a creature's natural defenses against toxins and eventually turns those defenses against the poisoned creature. Nitharit poison is often used as a precursor to weaken a target before a second poisoning assault. For example, an assassin might put nitharit poison in a magistrate's wine, then later in the evening return to finish the job with a stronger poison once the target's body is in no shape to fight it off.

魔地尘 Ungol Dust

Ungol dust is a black powder made of the crushed remains of dried-up spiders and scorpions that is so fine that one errant breath can blow away an entire dose. Most of those who craft this poison wear masks to ensure that they do not accidentally disperse—or inhale—the dust before packing it into small, easily shattered pellets. When ungol dust comes into contact with flesh or other living material, it becomes highly corrosive.

2级：辅助威能 Utility Power

Part of being an assassin is knowing which tool to use in any situation. Some executioners master the power of shadow magic early to gain a supernatural edge over their targets. Others simply refine their natural skills, pushing themselves to peak performance.

Benefit: 你获得1个2级或更低级的刺客辅助威能

3级：死亡攻击 Death Attack

Executioners know how to ensure that the job gets done. You rarely leave your enemies on the brink of death and know how to drive your weapon just a little deeper to turn a grave wound into a killing blow.

Benefit: 当你以一次造成伤害的近战或远程攻击命中一个敌人时，如果该敌人在伤害结算后生命值为10或更低，则你可以选择让该敌人的生命值自动降到0

4级：属性值增加 Ability Score Increase

Shadow is becoming so ingrained within you that it infuses your essential nature and makes you more than you were before.

Benefit: 你选择的两个属性值都增加1点

4级：灵活降落 Nimble Drop .inden

Druid Class.name: 德鲁伊 Druid
Druid Class.description:
Role: 。你的野兽形态使你能够使用近距离的控制威能，而你的类人形态使你能够从远处妨碍对手。基于职业特性和威能的不同选择，你的第二职位倾向于领导者或打击者。

Power Source: 。你通过谨慎的研究和与自然界沟通来获得你的威能。

Key Abilities: 感知，敏捷，体质

Armor Proficiencies: 布甲，皮甲，革甲

Weapon Proficiencies: 简易近战，简易远程

Implement: 法杖，图腾

Bonus to Defense: +1反射，+1意志

Hit Points at 1st Level: 12 + 体质值

Hit Points per Level Gained: 5

Healing Surges per Day: 7 + 体质调整值

Trained Skills: 自然。1级时，从下列职业技能列表中，再选择3个受训技能。

Class Skills: 神秘(Int)，运动(Str)，交涉(Cha)，坚韧(Con)，医疗(Wis)，历史(Int)，洞察(Wis)，自然(Wis)，侦查(Wis)

 

「我即探索者，我即追寻者，我即风暴。」

德鲁伊神秘而又高深莫测，将荒野视为自己的家园。他们可以和狼群一起飞奔，同远古的树木交谈，并从云层上方观察脚下的雷暴。他们将挑战当作对自己的适应性和同自然交流的能力的试炼。尽管许多德鲁伊显示出平和的外表，但他们拥有野兽的狡猾和飓风的狂暴。

不管你是在荒野中出生还是刻意脱离了文明，不管你是选择了自己的道路还是响应内心深处的呼唤，你都同自然之灵分享着与自然的联系。你既不是它们的仆人，也不是它们的主人，但是微风、树木和野兽都会留心你的话语，因为它们将你视为同胞。

呼唤自然之灵，它们就会缠住你的对手或者用风暴痛击你的敌人。释放自己的灵魂，你就会成为桀骜不逊的太初之兽。

德鲁伊简介

角色特性: 你把若干强力的远程和区域威能与变身野兽形态的能力结合起来，给予你的敌人直接的打击。根据你选择的威能，你可以在野兽形态或类人形态下战斗。

信仰: 多数德鲁伊并不崇拜众星之海的神，而是使他们的生命和信仰适用自然的原始精魂。或许称呼他们与这些灵魂的关系为崇拜是一种误解，但德鲁伊在路途之中呼唤精魂，恳求援助，献出烧焦的食物和飞溅的血液平息他们。

种族: 精灵和利爪半兽化人是完美的捕食德鲁伊，融合天生的洞察力及生来具有的优雅和灵活性。矮人则偏向守护德鲁伊；歌利亚斯和人类德鲁伊也常常追随守护德鲁伊的道路。

 

德鲁伊职业特性

德鲁伊具有下列职业特性。

自然平衡 Balance of Nature

有些德鲁伊喜欢维持野兽形态，而另一些则喜欢维持类人形态。 无论如何， 正如德鲁伊们寻求神圣力量和原始力量之间的平衡， 德鲁伊们也在在自己的头脑和身体之间追求着平衡。

你一开始拥有3个随意攻击威能。贯穿你的职业生涯，其中至少一个，至多两个威能必须有野兽形态关键字。这样，你可以通过野兽形态或类人形态进行有效攻击。

原力姿态 Primal Aspect

德鲁伊的学识可以同太初之兽交谈，它是世界上第一个高贵的捕食者精魂。这个生物以有着阴影、毛皮、羽毛和利爪的变换不定的姿态出现在许多德鲁伊的面前，他们在使用@UUID[Compendium.dnd-4e-compendium.module-powers.uIPQz3SRDEs59goh]{野性变身 Wild Shape}和野兽形态威能时同太初之兽交谈。作为一个德鲁伊，选择你的威能中最强烈体现出的是太初之兽的那种姿态。

从下列选项中选择一个。你的选择会给特定的德鲁伊威能提供增益，并在这些威能中详细说明。

原力守护者 Primal Guardian: 当你未穿着重甲时，你可以用你的体质调整值代替敏捷或智力调整值来决定你的AC。

原力掠食者 Primal Predator: 当你未穿着重甲时，你在速度上获得+1加值。

原力集群 Primal Swarm（PrP）: 当你处于野兽形态且未穿着重甲时，近战攻击和远程攻击对你造成的伤害受到你体质调整值的减值。

原力之怒 Primal Wrath（HoEC）: 当你未穿着重甲时，你在具有寒冰、火焰、闪电或雷鸣关键字的德鲁伊攻击威能和德鲁伊典范攻击威能的攻击骰上获得+1加值。

仪式施法 Ritual Casting

你获得仪式施法者 Ritual Caster作为奖励专长，允许你使用魔法仪式。你拥有一本仪式书，里面包含有两个由你选择并掌握的仪式：动物信使 Animal Messenger和另一个1级仪式。

每天1次，你可以使用动物信使 Animal Messenger而不需要花费材料。

野性变身 Wild Shape

作为一个德鲁伊，你拥有将野兽的原始能量引导到你的物理形态之中，并化身为一头野兽的能力。你拥有一项随意威能，@UUID[Compendium.dnd-4e-compendium.module-powers.uIPQz3SRDEs59goh]{野性变身 Wild Shape}，使你可以呈现野兽的外形，同时许多德鲁伊威能拥有野兽形态关键字并因此只有在你处于野兽形态时才能使用。

@UUID[Compendium.dnd-4e-compendium.module-powers.uIPQz3SRDEs59goh]{野性变身 Wild Shape}威能在不改变你的体型的前提下使你可以呈现类似某种自然界或妖精界野兽的形态，通常是四足的哺乳类猛兽，例如熊，野猪，豹，狼或者狼獾。你的野兽形态也可能是一团朦胧的暗色毛皮和利爪，就像是太初之兽的化身，所有现存的野兽都只是它身上的一个残片。当你使用@UUID[Compendium.dnd-4e-compendium.module-powers.uIPQz3SRDEs59goh]{野性变身 Wild Shape}时你选择一种特定形态，同时这个形态对你的游戏数据没有影响。

你选择的「原力姿态」或许会对你偏好呈现的形态提供建议，同时某些野兽形态威能会在你使用它们时改变你的形态。你也可以在野兽形态下变成更奇异的野兽：像狂怒龙兽或鳄鱼那样的爬虫，或者鸮熊或鲨蜥兽这样的奇幻野兽。

 

法器

德鲁伊使用法杖和图腾作为聚集自然能量的手段。当你使用带有魔法的法杖或者图腾时，你可以将它的增强加值附加到有法器关键字的德鲁伊威能和德鲁伊典范之道威能的攻击骰和伤害骰上。没有法器时，你依然可以使用这些威能。

 

德鲁伊威能

Your powers are evocations that call on primal spirits to alter your physical form and hamper your enemies. You call up roots and vines from the ground, summon lightning from the sky, engulf your enemies in fire, or transform yourself into a fierce predator whose howl can shake your foes with fear.

Druid (Protector) Class.name: 德鲁伊 Druid (Protector)
Druid (Protector) Class.description:
Role: 。你精通自然的力量和魔法，使用它们在自然世界和那些想要破坏它的人之间建立一道防线。

Power Source:

Key Abilities: 感知，体质，敏捷

Armor Proficiencies: 布甲，皮甲，革甲

Weapon Proficiencies: 简易近战，简易远程

Implement: 法杖，图腾

Bonus to Defense: +1反射，+1意志

Hit Points at 1st Level: 12 + 体质值

Hit Points per Level Gained: 5

Healing Surges per Day: 7 + 体质调整值

Trained Skills: 自然。1级时，从下列职业技能列表中，再选择3个受训技能。

Class Skills: 神秘(Int)、运动(Str)、交涉(Cha)、坚韧(Con)、医疗(Wis)、历史(Int)、洞察(Wis)、自然(Wis)、侦查(Wis)

 

属于德鲁伊 Druid的一种

Though most people associate the Feywild with arcane magic, it is also home to some of the most pristine regions of natural growth across all of the planes. Primeval forests sit untouched by civilization since their creation, alongside mountainsides and hilltops upon which no intelligent being has ever set foot. It should be no surprise that there are those who have chosen a life of protection and guardianship over the natural treasures of the plane.

As with all druids, protectors are the masters of the magic first shared with mortals by the primal spirits. The primal spirits might dwell chiefly in the world, but the druids of the Feywild hear their call and heed their guidance even in the fey realm. Though it might seem as though the presence of the primal spirits in the Feywild would be at a diminished level, in truth primal magic is often among the most effective tools to use in a plane infused with arcane magic. Where many of the dangers of the Feywild have evolved over the eons to deal with the omnipresent nature of arcane threats, primal magic is still untamed and unanticipated by most creatures of the plane.

As a protector, you learned your primal magic from a druid circle, which trained you to protect nature and punish those that would do it harm. By ensuring that the land, the water, and the sky inhabited by the primal spirits is protected, you become a staunch defender of those who live in harmony with nature and show respect for their natural surroundings.

You might go out into the world to seek new experiences and powerful artifacts of primal magic. Though you will stray far from your druid circle in the course of your adventures, your efforts reflect on its goals, and you will use the knowledge it has granted you to battle despoilers and defilers throughout the world and across the planes.

 

创建一个保护者

保护者是德鲁伊 Druid的一种，德鲁伊 Druid的信息在PH2中。要创建一个保护者，使用万律书或玩家手册里的角色创建规则。

保护者不具备PH2中下列这些德鲁伊职业特性：「自然平衡」，「仪式施法」，和@UUID[Compendium.dnd-4e-compendium.module-powers.uIPQz3SRDEs59goh]{野性变身 Wild Shape}。

保护者获得新的职业特性：@UUID[Compendium.dnd-4e-compendium.module-powers.a3ux6KLkAj2YrMG5]{自然生长 Nature's Growth}，「德鲁伊集会」——它也决定了德鲁伊的「原力姿态」，「原力协调」，和@UUID[Compendium.dnd-4e-compendium.module-powers.WC4meyGF2R7NkK9E]{召唤自然盟友 Summon Natural Ally}

另外，保护者升级时会获得@UUID[Compendium.dnd-4e-compendium.module-powers.WC4meyGF2R7NkK9E]{召唤自然盟友 Summon Natural Ally}的额外使用次数，而不是获得德鲁伊每日攻击威能。保护者在更高级时会获得召唤更多强力生物的能力

 

保护者职业特性

保护者具有下列职业特性。

自然生长 Nature's Growth

One of your fundamental evocations, nature’s growth allows you to bring life to even the harshest conditions and climes. The power of nature erupts at your command to hinder your foes, even as you slip through the hindrance with ease.

德鲁伊集会 Druid Circle

Each protector druid belongs to a druid circle, a group of like-minded servants of nature. A druid circle bears some similarity to the orders of clerics and other servants of the gods. However, the druids of your circle serve a different entity as they revere and protect the natural world.

A druid circle might be a secret society of masters of primal magic, congregating to enact an agenda known only to themselves. A circle is just as likely to devote itself solely to the communities that arise along the fringe of the wilderness, acting as mystics and advisors while they channel the wisdom of the natural world. Whatever its motive and structure, each druid circle is known for the wisdom of its older members, whose counsel is sought by influential members of all cultures and races.

A druid circle has a hierarchy much like that of a religious organization. At 1st level, you are an initiate of your circle. As you gain levels, you improve your standing. Even as your adventuring career brings you experience and prestige, it grants you influence with your fellow druids. With the growth of your mastery of primal magic, you gain greater understanding of the secrets kept by your order. Many druid circles guard mysteries of primal power said to have been handed down in the first days following the Dawn War. The higher you rise through the ranks, the more of these pieces of ancient lore are revealed to you.

Benefit: 选择一个德鲁伊集会。你获得该集会的增益。

恢复集会 Circle of Renewal

As a member of the Circle of Renewal, your mission is to restore places ravaged by war and unnatural threats. Druids such as you make it their cause to bring life back to parched deserts and scrublands, or to seed life for the first time in areas that have never known it.

Your druid circle teaches you that the life created by your nature's growth can be used to heal the land of its wounds. The plants you draw forth even from rock or lifeless wasteland exude a primal energy that helps speed the restorative process for your allies.

Benefit: 你获得下列特性。

原力守护者 Primal Guardian：当你未穿着重甲时，你可以用你的体质调整值代替敏捷或智力调整值来决定你的AC

治愈生长 Healing Growth：当一个在你的@UUID[Compendium.dnd-4e-compendium.module-powers.a3ux6KLkAj2YrMG5]{自然生长 Nature's Growth}区域内或邻近此区域的盟友花费一次回复力来恢复生命值时，他恢复等同于你体质调整值的额外生命值

庇护集会 Circle of Shelter

A druid who chooses the Circle of Shelter has made a pledge to defend the bounty of nature. Members of your druid circle watch over forests, plains, and grasslands, keeping them safe from monsters, uncaring humanoids, and dark magic.

Your druid circle teaches you to shape your nature's growth for the benefit of your allies, giving them an advantage of movement in the midst of combat.

Benefit: 你获得下列特性。

原力掠食者 Primal Predator：当你未穿着重甲时，你在速度上获得+1加值

无阻生长 Unhindering Growth：你的盟友无视由你的@UUID[Compendium.dnd-4e-compendium.module-powers.a3ux6KLkAj2YrMG5]{自然生长 Nature's Growth}创造的困难地形

原力协调 Primal Attunement

Your innate connection to the power of the primal spirits grants you a measure of control over the world around you. With your magic, you manipulate your surroundings to your advantage.

Benefit: 你获得3个你选择的「原力协调」威能。

大气精魂 Air Spirit

The primal spirits of the air are everpresent in the natural world and are always ready to lend their aid to your cause.

召唤精魂 Call the Spirits

The greatest of the primal spirits boast a level of power that you can only dream of one day gaining access to. However, even the least of the spirits can prove useful in your everyday life.

荒野感官 Senses of the Wild

As a protector, you are one with the natural order, and you can detect disruptions in that order and the balance between life and death.

青翠之触 Verdant Touch

Your touch can heal the land and direct its growth, letting you gently impose your will on plant life and allowing it to prosper.

藤蔓绳索 Vine Rope

The primal spirits of the earth send forth a sturdy vine at your command, providing a helpful tool or an easy escape at a moment's notice.

召唤自然盟友 Summon Natural Ally

You count the creatures of the natural world as your allies. With magic learned from the elders of your druid circle, you can call one of those creatures to you at any time and across any distance. With this ally at your side, you can tip the balance of combat in your favor.

由于该特性，你在5，9，15，19，25，或29级时不会获得德鲁伊每日攻击威能。作为替代，你在1级时获得@UUID[Compendium.dnd-4e-compendium.module-powers.WC4meyGF2R7NkK9E]{召唤自然盟友 Summon Natural Ally}威能。5级时，你每天能使用@UUID[Compendium.dnd-4e-compendium.module-powers.WC4meyGF2R7NkK9E]{召唤自然盟友 Summon Natural Ally}2次。9级时，你每天能使用@UUID[Compendium.dnd-4e-compendium.module-powers.WC4meyGF2R7NkK9E]{召唤自然盟友 Summon Natural Ally}3次

原力守护者 Primal Guardian

1级: The creatures of the remote deserts of the world are among the most resilient, sharing a strength that they dedicate to you in combat. Said to have no natural enemies, the giant cobra has a venomous bite that can drop prey in a heartbeat. The desert hawk is a patient predator whose swooping strikes can stagger any foe.

你可以使用@UUID[Compendium.dnd-4e-compendium.module-powers.WC4meyGF2R7NkK9E]{召唤自然盟友 Summon Natural Ally}召唤一个巨大眼镜蛇 Giant Cobra或沙漠猎鹰 Desert Hawk

15级: As your power grows, you are able to call on beasts from more desolate climes, capable of surviving conditions that would slay lesser creatures. The venomous scorpion is an instinctive killer whose poison will freeze a foe in its tracks. The rare bulette is a brute of a beast, its enormous claws raking through foes or enabling it to swim through solid ground as a shark moves through water.

你可以使用@UUID[Compendium.dnd-4e-compendium.module-powers.WC4meyGF2R7NkK9E]{召唤自然盟友 Summon Natural Ally}召唤一个鲨蜥兽 Bulette或毒蝎 Venomous Scorpion

29级: When you are at the height of the epic tier, the creatures you summon are the fiercest predators of the wastelands. A blue dragon wyrmling that answers your call is no less formidable for its relatively small size, but it overcomes its naturally wicked tendencies to do your bidding. When you summon a desert roc, you claim the allegiance of a fell bird of prey that can descend on your enemies and snatch them up before they can escape.

你可以使用@UUID[Compendium.dnd-4e-compendium.module-powers.WC4meyGF2R7NkK9E]{召唤自然盟友 Summon Natural Ally}召唤一个雏蓝龙 Blue Dragon Wyrmling或沙漠巨鹏 Desert Roc

原力掠食者 Primal Predator

1级: The creatures of the wilderness live in harmony with nature, but they are fierce in defense of their territories and their young. You call on that fierceness when you summon the grizzly bear or the pack wolf to fight at your side.

你可以使用@UUID[Compendium.dnd-4e-compendium.module-powers.WC4meyGF2R7NkK9E]{召唤自然盟友 Summon Natural Ally}召唤一个灰熊 Grizzly Bear或头狼 Pack Wolf

15级: Your commitment to defending nature grants you sway over the strongest and most perilous creatures of the forest and jungle. The dire bear is a larger, primeval version of the deadly grizzly you earlier learned to tame. The hunting tiger is an enormous feral beast of the jungle, a lone stalker with fangs like daggers and a thirst for blood.

你可以使用@UUID[Compendium.dnd-4e-compendium.module-powers.WC4meyGF2R7NkK9E]{召唤自然盟友 Summon Natural Ally}召唤一个凶暴熊 Dire Bear或猎虎 Hunting Tiger

{{凶暴熊

Druid (Sentinel) Class.name: 德鲁伊 Druid (Sentinel)
Druid (Sentinel) Class.description:
Role: 。You wield the magic of the natural world, using your connection to the primal spirits to tend the wounds of your allies and lead them to victory.

Power Source:

Key Abilities: 感知，体质

Armor Proficiencies: 布甲，皮甲，革甲；轻盾

Weapon Proficiencies: 简易近战，简易远程

Implement: 法杖，图腾

Bonus to Defense: +2强韧

Hit Points at 1st Level: 12 + 体质值

Hit Points per Level Gained: 5

Healing Surges per Day: 7 + 体质调整值

Trained Skills: 自然。1级时，从下列职业技能列表中，再选择3个受训技能。

Class Skills: 神秘(Int)，运动(Str)，交涉(Cha)，坚韧(Con)，医疗(Wis)，历史(Int)，洞察(Wis)，自然(Wis)，侦查(Wis)

 

属于德鲁伊 Druid的一种

As a sentinel, you use primal power to shelter your allies and defeat those that would disrupt the balance of the natural world. Some sentinels take up the profession with the expectation of becoming the leader or advisor of a frontier village. Others become hermits or wanderers, which leads naturally to the adventurer's life. However, all sentinels use their mastery of primal magic to help the people of the frontier survive hardships and maintain a respectful relationship with the natural world.

As a sentinel, you draw power from the primal spirits—ancient guardians of the world that represent the countless aspects of nature. Although many denizens of the wild feel a connection to the primal spirits, you take that connection to its highest level. You are a creature of both the natural world and the spiritual world, whose task it is to stand against the forces that threaten both.

 

 

1级：自然循环之侍从 Acolyte of the Natural Cycle

作为一名哨兵，你承担着维持成长，死亡，重生这季节周期内在平衡的责任。1级时，每个哨兵选择一种季节以展示此方面自然之力的亲和。你选择的季节决定了一些你的职业特性，包括你获得的动物伙伴。

春之德鲁伊 Druid of Spring

You draw your strength from the spring, a time when life emerges once more from the bleakness of winter and reaches for the sun. You believe that all things can be renewed, and you show your allies how to shrug off pain and injury, just as the spring sun melts away the last remnants of winter's snow.

Your chosen weapons are the scimitar, the spear, the dagger, and the sickle. The bright steel of these weapons gleams like the spring sun. In battle, you rely on accuracy and precision rather than brute force to defeat your foes.

Benefit: 你获得下列增益

* 你的动物伙伴是一匹狼 * 你获得弯刀擅长 * 你在使用弯刀、矛、匕首和镰刀的攻击骰上获得+1加值 * 你在医疗检定上获得+2加值 夏之德鲁伊 Druid of Summer

You feel the strongest association with the high heat of summer, a time when the life of the natural world stands in full bloom. You are a symbol of the power and vibrancy of life, embodying the full resilience of nature. You draw strength from the light of the sun, the green of the forest, and the blue of the sky, demonstrating to your allies that the present is always the season of their greatest strength.

Your chosen weapons are the staff and the club. They represent summer's enduring strength, the trees that flourish in that season and persist through the darkest winter. Your fighting style reflects that strength, as you rely on overpowering force to batter your foes into submission.

Benefit: 你获得下列增益

* 你的动物伙伴是一只熊 * 当持用单手硬头锤时，你使用d10作为此武器伤害
当持用杖或双手硬头锤时，你使用d12作为此武器伤害 * 你在运动检定上获得+2加值 荒原德鲁伊 Druid of the Wastes（HoEC）

You draw your strength from the world's majestic desolate places—the icy wastes of the north, the bleak shores, the great sandy deserts, or the barren rocky mountains. In these places the primal spirits embody the living elements and take on elemental-like forms.

Benefit: 你获得下列增益

* 你的动物伙伴是一个活体微风 * 当持用矛或杖时，你在AC和反射上获得+1盾牌加值 * 你在坚韧检定上获得+2加值 1级：动物伙伴 Animal Companion

Your primal connection with the natural world allows you to draw forth a spirit that manifests as a creature of flesh and blood. This bond grants the animal special characteristics shaped by your connection to the primal spirits. A druid of summer gains a bear companion to reflect the indomitable strength and power of summer. A druid of spring gains a wolf, a cunning, agile hunter filled with energy and determination.

Your animal companion obeys your commands without hesitation, making it more responsive to your commands than even the most well-trained beast. The bond also allows you to communicate with your animal companion, enabling you to work together toward mutual goals.

Benefit: 你获得一个与你的「自然循环之侍从」职业特性相关联的动物伙伴

你的动物伙伴对你和你的盟友来说视为一个盟友。它可以像任何其他生物一样受到威能的影响。

你可以和你的动物伙伴通过心灵感应沟通，只要它离你20格内。这样做不需要有视线以及效果线。你的动物伙伴只有动物的智力，所以不能沟通或理解复杂的话题。

你的动物伙伴等级与你相同，并且它的生命值,防御和攻击都由你的等级决定，这些都记录在它的数据表上。

你的动物伙伴共享你的回复力。当一个效果要求你的动物伙伴花费一个回复力时，这个回复力从你的回复力中扣除。当你使用你的回气时，你的动物伙伴也恢复等同于你回复力值的生命值。在一次短休息结束时，你的动物伙伴恢复它所有的生命值。

如果你死亡或你的动物伙伴的生命值降到0，则你的动物伙伴消失，因为维持它的原力魔法已经消散。你有两种方法召回你的动物伙伴：

✦次要动作: 你花费一个次要动作并失去一个回复力。这样做会使你的动物伙伴出现在离你最近的未被占据的空间，且它生命值等同于你回复力值。

✦短休息或长休息: 你在休息结束时失去一个回复力。这么做会使你的动物伙伴出现在离你最近的未被占据的空间，且它生命值全满。

动物伙伴动作 Animal Companion Actions

作为受你控制的生物，你的动物伙伴离你20格内时依托你的指令行动。你花费动作使它行动，且它在遭遇中的先攻顺序和你是一样的

标准动作: 要进行一个标准动作，你的动物伙伴需要你花费一个标准动作来命令它这样做。

移动动作: 当你进行一个移动动作时，你的动物伙伴也可以进行一个移动动作。或者，你可以留在原地而以一个移动动作来命令你的动物伙伴进行一个移动动作。

次要动作: 要进行一个次要动作，你的动物伙伴需要你花费一个次要动作来命令它这样做。

自由动作: 你的动物伙伴可以进行自由动作，而不需要你花费动作来命令它。

触发动作: 若你的动物伙伴的一个触发动作被触发，它只有在你花费同样类型的动作来命令它这样做时才能进行这个动作。例如，若一个邻近你的动物伙伴的敌人触发了它的借机攻击，则你必须花费一个借机动作来命令你的动物伙伴来进行此攻击。

动物伙伴独立动作 Animal Companion Independent Actions

在你不能对你的动物伙伴发出命令的情况下，你的动物伙伴可以独立行动。例如，若你失去意识或离你的动物伙伴超过20格，则它不会闲坐着等你出现（除非你事先有命令它这样做）。

一个动物伙伴独立行动时在它的回合内可以进行一个标准动作、一个移动动作或一个次要动作。它也可以进行借机动作和自由动作，但它不能进行即时动作。

春之德鲁伊：狼 Druid of Spring: Wolf

Wolves are stealthy predators that prowl the forests and tundra. Your primal bond with your wolf enhances your connection to the wilderness and gives you a stalwart companion at your side.

夏之德鲁伊：熊 Druid of Summer: Bear

Found throughout the forests of the world, the bear is a powerful lord of beasts. Your animal companion packs a greater punch with its attacks, even as its presence invigorates your allies.

荒原德鲁伊：活体微风 Druid of the Wastes: Living Zephyr

The living zephyr is a minor elemental that takes its shape from the terrain around it—dust, sand, snow, ocean spray, or sometimes wind.

1级：原力守护者 Primal Guardian

Your innate connection to nature grants you the resilience of the primal spirits.

Benefit: 当你未穿着重甲时，你可使用体质调整值代替敏捷或智力调整值来决定你的AC。

1级：联合攻击 Combined Attack

The iconic expression of the link you forge with your animal companion, combined attack lets you use your own attack to inspire your companion to greater fury. Used at the height of battle, this power allows the two of you to attack with the speed and grace of a single creature, unleashing a devastating combination strike.

Benefit: 你获得@UUID[Compendium.dnd-4e-compendium.module-powers.kpLlh3Orisc5fmzq]{联合攻击 Combined Attack}威能

1级：治愈真言 Healing Word

One of the earliest powers mastered by many druids, healing word allows your primal magic to heal even the most grievous wounds.

Benefit: 你获得@UUID[Compendium.dnd-4e-compendium.module-powers.5wfZztM0RjQlVLiY]{治愈真言 Healing Word}威能

1级：随意威能 At-Will Power

You place yourself in the front lines of combat, the better to defend against those that threaten the natural world and its people. At 1st level, you adopt a signature combat move that will serve you well in any fight.

Benefit: 你获得1个1级德鲁伊随意攻击威能

1级：每日威能 Daily Power

The most potent of your powers channel all the primal power of earth, air, and sky that you have at your command. These attacks are so potent that the spirits that grant them can be called on only once per day.

Benefit: 你获得1个1级德鲁伊每日攻击威能

1级：荒野秘诀 Wilderness Knacks

Druids, like rangers, are experts in outdoor survival. As a primal adept, you have learned several mundane tricks and techniques to aid you in traveling through the wilds.

Benefit: 你选择获得下列能力中的2个

野兽共鸣 Beast Empathy

The beasts of the wilderness see and know most of what unfolds in their realm. Few folk heed them, but you have learned to understand and interpret their actions and attitudes. Your woodcraft is short of the magical ability to communicate with animals directly, but it is enough to reveal secrets that others miss.

Benefit: 你在对野兽的唬骗、交涉和威吓检定上获得+2加值。你可以传达简单的概念和命令给这些生物，即使它们未被强迫来服从你。通过一次成功的洞察检定（DC由DM决定），你可以通过阅读一个生物的肢体语言和声音来理解其所想表达的基本信息。

草药学识 Herb Lore

You have studied the properties of various plants. Even in distant lands your lore serves you well in finding the right leaves and roots to harvest. By brewing a soothing tea or mixing a poultice, you help soothe the aches, bruises, and cuts you and your allies suffer.

Benefit: 你和每位盟友在短休息中花费回复力时，他的回复力值增加2（11级时为4，21级时为6）。要获得此收益，你必须是在一个容易获取植物的地区进行短休息。

山地向导 Mountain Guide

You have clambered over steep cliffs and ranged across imposing mountains. Your knack for climbing allows you to pick out the easiest paths up even the most imposing slopes.

Benefit: 当你在攀爬上的一次运动检定成功时，你的盟友进行该攀爬的DC减少2直到遭遇结束。只有看见你攀爬的盟友才能获得此增益。

警觉休息 Watchful Rest

Long days spent in the wilds have taught you the best way to set up a camp. By picking out an easily de

Warlord (Marshal) Class.name: 督军 Warlord (Marshal)
Warlord (Marshal) Class.description:
Role: 。你以呼喊的命令和巧妙的策略召集你的同伴，通过更高级的战术引导他们取得胜利。

Power Source:

Key Abilities: 力量；智力或魅力

Armor Proficiencies: 布甲，皮甲，革甲，链甲；轻盾

Weapon Proficiencies: 简易近战，军用近战，简易远程

Bonus to Defense: +1强韧、+1意志

Hit Points at 1st Level: 12 + 体质值

Hit Points per Level Gained: 5

Healing Surges per Day: 7 + 体质调整值

Trained Skills: 1级时，从下列职业技能列表中，选择4个受训技能。

Class Skills: 运动(Str)，交涉(Cha)，坚韧(Con)，医疗(Wis)，历史(Int)，威吓(Cha)

 

「冲向胜利！怎能让它在我等之前！」

When dark forces muster in the wilderness, when hosts of monsters assemble to sack civilization's last redoubts, it falls to the marshal to lead the warriors in defense of their lands. Marshals draw from their experience and passion to lend courage, skill, and hope to those under their command. A warlord forms the iron core of any unit of soldiers, uniting their purpose and bolstering their commitment to see the conflict to its conclusion.

A marshal's talents can come from many different aspects of personality or endeavor. Some depend on their bravado, goading their companions to take risks in order to reap great rewards. Others have keen insight into their enemies' minds. Some marshals specialize in hit-and-run tactics, and others are resourceful leaders who always have some trick up their sleeves. The most common marshals include those whose presence alone is enough to bind disparate heroes together and the tactical savants who spot weaknesses and exploit them.

Marshals develop specialized combat maneuvers called exploits. In their elementary form, they are strikes and commands designed to shift the battle toward a more favorable outcome. In addition to these exploits, marshals issue commands and orders that improve their allies' performance. Some of these commands can restore health and vigor, while others make allies more alert and ready for new challenges.

Most marshals have already had experience in the field, even if it came from leading a tiny expedition. Some are former military leaders who have relinquished their commands to seek their fortunes in the world. Others might have lost their units and be out for revenge against the enemy that brought them to ruin. Whatever the individual's triumphs or defeats were before becoming an adventurer, every marshal has the ability to lead, and lead well.

 

元帅职业特性

元帅具有下列职业特性。

战斗领袖 Combat Leader

你和离你10格内的任何能看见你且听见你的盟友在先攻检定上获得+2威能加值。

精明领袖 Canny Leader（MP2）

此职业特性会替代「战斗领袖」职业特性

你和离你10格内的任何能看见你且听见你的盟友在洞察检定和侦查检定上获得+2加值。

前线领袖|Battlefront Leader（MP2）

此职业特性会替代「战斗领袖」职业特性

你获得重盾的擅长，并且获得@UUID[Compendium.dnd-4e-compendium.module-powers.dOlbHYpsN5W29Tcx]{前线动势 Battlefront Shift}威能。

领导力 Commanding Presence

从下列选项中选择一个。

激励风采 Inspiring Presence: 当一个能见到你的盟友花费一个行动点进行额外动作时，他同时恢复等同于你一半等级 + 你的魅力调整值的生命值。

如果该盟友能看见多个有该特性的督军，他只从其中一个获得该增益（由盟友选择）

战术风采 Tactical Presence : 当一个你可见的盟友花费一个行动点进行攻击时，他在此攻击的第一个攻击骰上获得等同你一半的智力调整值的加值。

如果多个有该特性的督军能看见该盟友，他只从其中一个获得该增益（由盟友选择）

勇猛风采 Bravura Presence（MP）: 当一个能看见你的盟友使用一个行动点进行额外动作并使用该动作来进行攻击时，这个盟友在掷攻击骰前可以选择接受该特性的增益。当盟友选择接受增益时，如果此攻击命中，该盟友可在此攻击后以一个自由动作进行一次基本攻击或一次移动动作。如果此攻击失手，该盟友对所有敌人提供战斗优势直到他下一回合结束。

如果该盟友能看见多个有该特性的督军，他只能从其中一个获得该增益（由盟友选择）

机智风采 Resourceful Presence（MP）: 当一个能看见你的盟友使用一个行动点额外动作并使用该动作来进行攻击时，此攻击在伤害上获得等同于你等级的一半 + 你智力的调整值的加值。如果此攻击没有命中任何目标，则该盟友获得等同于你等级的一半 + 你魅力调整值的临时生命值。

如果该盟友能看见多个有该特性的督军，他只能从其中一个获得该增益（由盟友选择）

先见风采 Insightful Presence（MP2）: 当任何能看见你的盟友使用一个行动点进行额外动作时，该盟友在所有防御上获得等同于你的一半感知调整值或你的一半魅力调整值的加值，直到该盟友的下回合开始。

如果该盟友能看见多个有该特性的督军，他只能从其中一个获得该增益（由盟友选择）

游击风采 Skirmishing Presence（MP2）: 当一个能看见你的盟友花费一个行动点进行攻击时，该盟友可以在此攻击前或攻击后用一个自由动作快步等同你的智力调整值或你的感知调整值的格数。

如果该盟友能看见多个有该特性的督军，他只能从其中一个获得该增益（由盟友选择）

振奋呼声 Inspiring Word

使用@UUID[Compendium.dnd-4e-compendium.module-powers.0ZYc2nJqa9AlruyU]{振奋呼声 Inspiring Word}这一威能时，督军光用一声满溢着激励的高呼便能让伙伴们得到额外的恢复。

射手督军 Archer Warlord（MP2）

当你选择该职业特性时，你失去链甲和轻盾的擅长。

你获得军用远程武器的擅长。另外，当你用弓进行远程基本攻击时，你的攻击骰和伤害骰可以用力量计算而不是敏捷

Wizard (Bladesinger) Class.name: 法师 Wizard (Bladesinger)
Wizard (Bladesinger) Class.description:
Role: 。You realize the ultimate blending of swordplay and spellcasting, unleashing magic and making attacks with your blade with equal ease.

Power Source:

Key Abilities: 智力，敏捷

Armor Proficiencies: 布甲，皮甲

Weapon Proficiencies: 简易近战，军用近战，简易远程，军用远程

Implement: 法珠，法杖，魔杖

Bonus to Defense: +2意志

Hit Points at 1st Level: 10 + 体质值

Hit Points per Level Gained: 4

Healing Surges per Day: 6 + 体质调整值

Trained Skills: 神秘。1级时，从下列职业技能列表中，再选择3个受训技能。

Class Skills: 杂技(Dex)，神秘(Int)，运动(Str)，交涉(Cha)，历史(Int)，威吓(Cha)，自然(Wis)，侦查(Wis)

 

属于法师的一种

Those who see a bladesinger in battle never forget the sight. Amid the chaos and blood, the bladesinger moves in an otherworldly dance. Spells and sword act as partners, matching awe-inspiring beauty with an awful deadliness. When the bladesinger engages in the true heart of the art, when the sword whirls through the air so swiftly that it keens and the air hums and whistles in chorus, when the bladesong has begun—then the bladesinger becomes something unreal, something timeless.

According to legend, Corellon himself inspired and taught the first bladesinger. The techniques handed down as a gift from the leader of the elven deities have passed from one to another among the Tel'Quessir for untold generations, and though different styles evolved as eladrin and elves turned its power to suit their needs, none have improved upon the essential core of the art.

The bladesinger wields a weapon one-handed, leaving the other free or using it to employ a wand that can be incorporated into the fighting style. This technique gives a bladesinger the speed and freedom of movement necessary for the dancelike motions of the various forms of martial art, which allow for both magical and physical attacks to flow freely.

Few among the Tel'Quessir have the honor of being inducted into the bladesingers. One must have the mind necessary to be a great wizard, and also the agility of the greatest dancer. Yet those traits alone are not enough. A bladesinger is first and foremost devoted to the ways and the people of the Tel'Quessir, for that was the purpose of Corellon's gift.

A bladesinger who has set out beyond the borders of a nation of the People must have had good cause. Adventuring bladesingers might seek out relics or locations of great meaning to the Tel'Quessir, or they could leave in order to guard a specific person or group against harm. A bladesinger might instead embark upon a quest to eliminate a threat to the People or to find and communicate with some long-lost branch of the race. In a more tragic case, a bladesinger might have failed in the duty to protect a community and be death-pledged to avenge it and restore his or her honor.

 

 

1级：本能攻击 Instinctive Attack

You have trained your body and your mind to work in concert so well that you can act without conscious thought. In your hands a sword is no mere weapon. It becomes an extension of your deadly will.

Benefit: 当你通过你单手持用的一件武器进行一次近战基本攻击时，你可以使用智力代替力量来计算攻击骰和伤害骰。

1级：谨慎挥舞 Guarded Flourish

With a blade in your hand, you weave a defensive web of steel that allows you to hurl spells or weapons without fear of reprisal from nearby foes.

Benefit: 当你手持一件单手近战武器时，你的远程攻击和区域攻击不会引发借机攻击。

另外，当你穿着轻甲或未着甲且一只手握持一件单手近战武器而另一只手没有武器和盾牌时，你在AC上获得+2盾牌加值

1级：剑刃魔法 Blade Magic

Your weapon becomes part of the magic you cast. Just as a mage can direct spells with a wand, destructive magic can spew from the point of your sword.

Benefit: 选择你擅长的一件单手近战轻刃或重刃武器。你获得此武器作为法器擅长，也就是说你可以通过此武器使用你的法器威能。此武器同时对你来说视为魔杖，但它只能作为武器来附魔

1级：剑咏 Bladesong

The bladesong lies at the heart of any bladesinger's craft. Bladesingers describe it as a period of peace amid war, calm in chaos, and clarity in confusion. When you enter the blade song, the world seems to slow even as, to an outside observer, your movements speed into a blur. Your concentration becomes absolute as mind and body, spell and sword meld into one perfection ofform. Then your sword sings the dirge of your foes.

Benefit: 你获得@UUID[Compendium.dnd-4e-compendium.module-powers.02kWnlITG3Dp84Po]{剑咏 Bladesong}威能

1级：剑咏士法术书 Bladesinger's Spellbook

Like other wizards, a bladesinger keeps a spellbook and prepares spells from it. Your spellbook holds the most powerful spells you learn as you advance in level.

Benefit: 在你到达特定等级时，你学会2个新法师威能并将它们加到你的法术书里（例如，2级时加入2个辅助威能）。每次在你的长休息结束的时候，你可以从你的法术书中选择一定数量的法师威能并准备它们。你可以准备的威能数量取决于你的等级。

你准备的威能就是这一天中你能使用的法师威能，此外还包括你的随意攻击威能和其他来源的威能，譬如种族威能。如果你在长休息结束后没有从你的法术书准备威能（例如你无法接触你的法术书），你可以使用你前一天准备的威能。查看“法师威能学习表”了解你在哪个等级可以在你的法术书里添加法师威能

任何你通过此职业特性加入到你的法术书里的法师遭遇攻击威能对你来说视为每日攻击威能。换言之，你每天只能使用它一次，而不是每遭遇一次，且你只能在一次长休息之后才能再次使用该威能。由于该威能视为每日攻击威能，所以你不能通过任何能为遭遇攻击威能充能的效果恢复它的使用。

从“每日准备法师威能表”中找到你的等级。对应的那行指明了你每天可以准备的遭遇攻击威能和辅助威能的数量。（此表不会记入你可能从其他来源获得的威能，例如典范之道。）你在同一天中不能准备超过一个的同等级的遭遇攻击威能和辅助威能。

1级：剑法术 Bladespells

A bladesinger mixes melee and magic with such ease and grace that every successful strike unleashes a spell. Unique to bladesingers, these bladespells lash out to affect even the most well-defended foes.

Benefit: 你获得3个带有剑法术关键字的法师随意攻击威能

跃舞火焰 Dancing Fire

Elves and eladrin must take care when using flame in the forest homes of their people, and thus many bladesingers learn to command the fires that their magic produces. The blow of a sword provides the opening to unleash a spritelike fire that burns an enemy without fear of anything else being set to smolder.

炫目光线 Dazzling Sunray

The bladesingers of old knew how to catch the reflection of the sun upon their glittering blades to temporarily blind distant foes. In time this tactic became a bladespell in many bladesingers' arsenal so that it might be used no matter how dark the day or deep the shadows of night.

冰霜禁制 Frost Bite

Even though the world has drastic extremes of weather, never does it approach the treacherous beauty of winter in the Feywild. Bladesingers who learn how to harness that frigid fey power can turn it to their advantage whenever they want.

闪电环带 Lightning Ring

A bladesinger's prowess comes from more sources than the Feywild. Like other wizards, bladesingers draw upon the Elemental Chaos, the Shadowfell, the Astral Sea, and the latent magic of the world to craft enchantments amid the swirl of their swords. With lightning ring, you use elemental forces to set a lightning bolt to chasing itself around a foe.

影子切割 Shadow Sever

Wielding arcane power through your blade, you drive the point of your weapon into your enemy's shadow, slicing it away. Forced from its caster, the desperate shadow seeks to drag someone over it so that it can hide from the light.

无形之手 Unseen Hand

When a bladesinger needs to bring a foe close or heave an enemy farther away, the trick is to summon forth a hand of force to guide the foe’s fate. Using this power, a bladesinger can act like a chess master playing about with pieces on a board.

1级：剑咏士每日威能

Wizard (Arcanist) Class.name: 法师 Wizard (Arcanist)
Wizard (Arcanist) Class.description:
Role: 。You command eldritch forces, shaping them into spells designed to blast your enemies, bring them under your thumb, twist their senses, and impede their movement.

Power Source:

Key Abilities: 智力；体质、敏捷或感知

Armor Proficiencies: 布甲

Weapon Proficiencies: 匕首，木棍

Implement: 法珠，法杖，魔杖，魔典

Bonus to Defense: +2意志

Hit Points at 1st Level: 10 + 体质值

Hit Points per Level Gained: 4

Healing Surges per Day: 6 + 体质调整值

Trained Skills: 神秘。1级时，从下面的职业技能列表中，再选择3项受训技能。

Class Skills: 神秘(Int)，交涉(Cha)，地城(Wis)，历史(Int)，洞察(Wis)，自然(Wis)，宗教(Int)

 

「我是燃烧之火，窒息之雾，带给敌人毁灭的风暴。」

秘法师是强大的法师，他们放弃了专业化，而是探索并使用奥术魔法所能提供的一切。与学派法师不同，秘法师不会将自己局限于特定的魔法学派，而是尝试各种各样的魔法效果，从塑能到死灵，无所不包。虽然被学派法师视为业余爱好者，但秘法师认为广泛的研究使他们能够应对各种情况，因为他们总是能够随时施展合适的法术。

秘法师是通才，也是理论派。这种奥术研究的路径更关注对法则的广泛理解，而不是与学派相关的具体技法。对于秘法师来说，如何施法比施展何种法术更重要。许多秘法师根据自己的想象力来学习和使用法术，而不是遵循学院的规定。

与学派法师一样，秘法师也倾向于冒险生活，因为这使他们有机会发现有趣的新法术和仪式，以添加到他们的法术书中。尽管他们可能缺乏专注，但秘法师在学习能力和知识应用方面与学派法师不相上下，并被视为任何冒险小队的重要成员。

 

秘法师职业特性

秘法师具有下列职业特性。

精通奥术法器 Arcane Implement Mastery

从下列选项中选择一个。

强迫之法珠 Orb of Imposition: 每遭遇一次，当你手持法珠时，你能在你的回合内以一个自由动作，来获得下面两个效果中的一个。

✦豁免骰减值：选择一个正承受由你法师威能带来的可豁免终止的效果影响着的生物。该生物在对抗此效果的下个豁免骰上受到等于你感知调整值的减值。

✦延长持续时间：选择一个由你的法师随意威能创造的持续效果。正常会在你当前回合结束时终止的效果，会在你下个回合结束的时终止。

欺诈之法珠 Orb of Deception（AP）: 每遭遇一次，当你持用法珠时，以一个自由动作，当你的一个法师幻术威能对一个敌人失手时，选择离失手目标3格以内的另一个敌人。被选中的敌人不能是原攻击的目标。对这个新目标重复这次攻击，并在此攻击骰上获得等于你的魅力调整值的加值。

防御之法杖 Staff of Defense: 当手持法杖时你在AC上获得+1加值。

另外，每遭遇一次，当你手持法杖时，你能以一个即时中断，在对抗一次攻击的所有防御上获得等于你体质调整值的加值。你可以在DM告诉你要受到的伤害值后再决定是否使用此能力。

精准之魔杖 Wand of Accuracy: 每遭遇一次，你能以一个自由动作在一次使用魔杖的攻击骰上获得等于你敏捷调整值的加值。

束缚之魔典 Tome of Binding（AP）: 每遭遇一次，以一个自由动作，如果你通过魔典使用奥术召唤威能时，则被这个威能召唤的所有生物在伤害骰上获得等同于你的体质调整值的加值。

你必须持用魔典才能获得此收益。召唤师喜欢这种形式的魔典精通因为这给他们的召唤威能带来明显的好处。这种形式的魔典精通也会为某些咒法威能带来好处。

预备之魔典 Tome of Readiness（AP）: 当你选择这种形式的精通法器时，选择一个你的等级或更低的你还未掌握的法师遭遇攻击威能。这个威能被储存并在之后可以使用。

每遭遇一次，以一个自由动作，你可以花费另一个尚未使用的与储存威能同级或更高级的法师遭遇攻击威能来使用储存威能。你必须仍然进行需要的动作来使用储存威能。

每次你到达能让你选择遭遇威能的等级时，你可以重新选择一个你的等级或更低的你还未掌握的法师遭遇攻击威能作为储存威能。

你必须持用魔典才能获得此收益。所有构建类型的法师都欣赏这种精通形式因为这使得他们在战斗中更加灵活。

秘法师法术书 Arcanist's Spellbook

你有一本法术书，该书充满了神秘知识，里面储存着你的每日和辅助威能以及你的仪式。

每日和辅助威能 Daily and Utility Powers: 你的法术书还储存着你的法师每日攻击威能和法师辅助威能（不包括你的戏法）。你一开始时在法术书里有2个每日攻击威能，你每天可以使用其中的一个。每次你到达允许你选择一个法师每日攻击威能或法师辅助威能的等级的时候，你选择两个不同的那类型的威能加入到你的法术书中。

在每次长休息之后，你可以准备一定数量的每日攻击威能和辅助威能，具体数量取决于你的等级每日可施展多少（参见下方”法师威能每日准备表“）。你不能在一天内准备同一个威能两次。

如果你因为升级或重训而替换了一个威能，则之前的那个威能从你的法术书中消失，被新的威能取代。

仪式 Rituals: 你的法术书包含了3个你选择的并掌握的1级仪式。

在5，11，15，21，25级时，你掌握2个你选择的仪式，并把它们加入到你的法术书中。当你选择仪式时，它们必须不高于你的等级。

容量 Capacity: 一个标准法术书有128页。每个威能占据1页。一个仪式会占据等于它等级的页数。

戏法 Cantrips

你从下列戏法中获得4个由你选择的戏法。

仪式施法 Ritual Castings

你获得仪式施法者 Ritual Caster专长作为额外专长，这允许你使用魔法仪式。

Wizard (Witch) Class.name: 法师 Wizard (Witch)
Wizard (Witch) Class.description:
Role: 。你修习最初的、最古老的奥术魔法形式，这让你能蛊惑、改变和诅咒你的敌人。

Power Source:

Key Abilities: 智力，感知

Armor Proficiencies: 布甲

Weapon Proficiencies: 匕首，木棍

Implement: 法珠，法杖，魔杖

Bonus to Defense: +2意志

Hit Points at 1st Level: 10 + 体质值

Hit Points per Level Gained: 4

Healing Surges per Day: 6 + 体质调整值

Trained Skills: 神秘。1级时，从下列职业技能列表中，再选择3个受训技能。

Class Skills: 神秘(Int)、交涉(Cha)、地城(Wis)、历史(Int)、洞察(Wis)、自然(Wis)、宗教(Int)

 

属于法师的一种

Part religion, part ritual, and all mystery, witchcraft is an ancient practice that came about in an age before arcane magic was studied, institutionalized, and etched in writing, when monstrous titans ruled over creation and the secret of making fire was yet undiscovered. In this chaotic dark age, the gods had little influence on the titans' world. Instead of seeking their aid, the primitive peoples called out to the night for protection and power, and a voice from the darkness answered. Those who accepted its arcane gifts became the first witches, and they wielded such power as only immortals had known—seen by some jealous gods as an affront that they have never forgiven.

Witches gain their power from a patron who instructs them by way of a mystical familiar that comes and goes as it pleases, unbound by the strictures of the material world. The most prevalent patron among witches—the original voice from the darkness—is the moon goddess Sehanine, referred to by witches as simply the Goddess. Other entities have since seen the advantage of imbuing mortals with power, and so your patron might be an archfey, a god, an angel, a primordial, a demon lord, a devil, or another legendary being that believes it can benefit by imbuing you with a gift of arcane prowess. It might prefer to remain anonymous.

The circumstances by which you obtained your gift can vary widely. Some witches seek out the gift in order to fulfill a personal desire or vendetta, while others were brought up in a coven. Some receive their power after making a pact with a devil, as a warlock might do, and others have it bestowed upon them by a fairy godparent or a witch queen.

Though witches are common among the fey races in the Feywild, as a witch in the natural world you must be mindful of whom you trust. In the world, common folk fear your kind. Envious wizards refuse to acknowledge you as a peer and would see your wondrous powers vanish from the world, while clerics of jealous gods decree you an unholy menace, sending witch hunters to track you down and destroy you.

 

创建一个巫师

巫师是法师的一种。要创建一个巫师，使用万律书或玩家手册里的角色创建规则。

巫师不具备PH中下列这些秘法师职业特性：「精通奥术法器」，「戏法」，「仪式施法」，和「秘法师法术书」。

巫师获得新的职业特性：「巫师魔宠」，「巫师戏法」，「月亮社」和@UUID[Compendium.dnd-4e-compendium.module-powers.Qz8wBNZDvIUO6cVx]{占卜术 Augury}

 

巫师职业特性

巫师具有下列职业特性。

巫师魔宠 Witch's Familiar

Unlike other wizards, a witch receives the gift of arcane power from a patron such as an archfey, a god, a devil, an angel, a demon, or another powerful being. The witch might or might not be aware of the patron's true identity or its reasons for bestowing power, but such entities always have their reasons, which become clear in time, for good or ill.

A witch's familiar takes the shape of a Tiny creature, usually a natural or a fey beast such as a cat, a serpent, or a raven, and acts as an intermediary between the witch and the patron of the witch's power. Bound to the witch's soul, this familiar instructs the witch in the use of supernatural powers.

Your familiar can have as active a role as you like. Familiars have a distinct personality and a unique relationship with the witches they instruct. Your familiar might provide hints and lore, or it might be a subtle presence in the background that appears and disappears without a sound, if you prefer to downplay its role in your story.

Benefit: 你获得奥术魔宠 <魔宠> Arcane Familiar 专长作为额外专长。

在每次长休息结束时，当你与你的魔宠交流时，你能将你的一个法师每日攻击威能或法师辅助威能替换成同类型的另一个法师威能。新威能必须具有等级，且等级必须和替换前的威能等级一致

当你到达24级时，你的魔宠使你能在你的回合内花费一个行动点来恢复一个你已经消耗的法师遭遇攻击威能，而不是进行额外动作。如果你这么做，则你此遭遇中下一次使用该威能时对该威能的每个目标都获得战斗优势

巫师戏法 Witch Cantrips

A witch knows a few tricks at the outset of his or her career that can be of great use even when other potent eldritch powers are also at the witch's disposal.

Benefit: 你获得由你选择的下列威能中的3个威能。

@UUID[Compendium.dnd-4e-compendium.module-powers.Q9sdLbYDN8AzoFIg]{幻音术 Ghost Sound}，@UUID[Compendium.dnd-4e-compendium.module-powers.SVp1oFkrs86Yej3x]{光亮术 Light}，@UUID[Compendium.dnd-4e-compendium.module-powers.WxsfPqu81ChQFbgp]{法师之手 Mage Hand}，@UUID[Compendium.dnd-4e-compendium.module-powers.yZkHUON0LiCXxvsA]{魔法技俩 Prestidigitation}

@UUID[Compendium.dnd-4e-compendium.module-powers.8dcEOv70b1VxBmSt]{暗示术 Suggestion}

@UUID[Compendium.dnd-4e-compendium.module-powers.hGIyp75Qexufc2dj]{破坏不死 Disrupt Undead}，@UUID[Compendium.dnd-4e-compendium.module-powers.ZkzBfnGwPAs1cQlJ]{恐吓 Spook}

@UUID[Compendium.dnd-4e-compendium.module-powers.JkfBSayAN0MgTwKn]{变色龙假面 Chameleon's Mask}

@UUID[Compendium.dnd-4e-compendium.module-powers.Ozyv8Tg4EW01Bthu]{踏水术 Water Stride}，@UUID[Compendium.dnd-4e-compendium.module-powers.jhrXZSztvdflBDJY]{风语术 Whispering Wind}

月亮社 Moon Coven

When you create your witch, you choose a moon coven with which you are affiliated. A moon coven is a loose order of witches that share a philosophy of witchcraft. Each moon coven represents one of two phases of the moon—full or dark (new)—and symbolizes the witch's quintessential attitude toward the application of his or her craft. Each moon coven reflects a member witch's philosophy regarding the use of magic—not necessarily corresponding to the witch's alignment, since witches of all alignments are found in each coven. Nevertheless, a greater number of evil witches gravitate toward the dark moon and its powers over ill fortune and necromancy, whereas good witches more frequently affiliate themselves with the full moon coven and favor its charms and healing magic.

Witches are solitary by nature, requiring little arcane instruction beyond the teachings of their familiar, and most prefer to keep their craft secret lest they be targeted by witch hunters. Therefore, a moon coven typically convenes only once during the course of a year, in an isolated location in the wilderness often near standing stones, ley lines, or other sites that thrum with arcane power, on an evening when the coven's moon phase displays in its ideal state in the dark heavens above. Despite their opposing philosophies on witchcraft, the two moon covens sometimes come together on the night of a lunar eclipse, when both are symbolically represented in the night sky. Such meetings occur only when all witches, or the world in which they live, are threatened by forces bent on their extermination.

In addition to, or instead of, meeting with their moon coven, some witches gather in local covens attended by witches that inhabit the area. Such local covens are often the way new witches are initiated into the craft, and they show the initiate the way to call on a powerful entity and receive the gift of its power in the form of a familiar. These local covens usually have their own aims and goals related to their immediate surroundings, and might or might not adhere to the philosophy of either of the moon covens.

Many witches learn their craft in isolation, unaware of the presence of the fundamental moon covens, or even of other witches. Regardless of whether a witch or a local coven identifies with a moon coven, every witch makes a choice concerning the type of witchcraft he or she wants to practice.

Benefit: 选择一个结社，且获得其增益。

暗月社 Dark Moon Coven

The witches of the dark moon coven believe that the night is a witch's birthright. Powers over fate and darkness are theirs to command, and they strive to further their own ends at any cost. Good dark moon witches use their powers of fear, terror, and darkness against the wicked, whereas evil dark moon witches blight those that cross them with ill fortune and plague, heedless of the mortal lives that fall in their wake. Dark moon witches call on the tides and the night winds and summon the dead from their graves; they conjure objects from nowhere, or imbue them with momentary life.

Benefit: 你获得@UUID[Compendium.dnd-4e-compendium.module-powers.jxzJcf8gMrRyD61s]{恐怖降灵术 Dread Presence}威能。

另外，你在威吓上受训。5级时，你在威吓检定和隐秘检定上获得+2加值

满月社 Full Moon Coven

Witches of the full moon coven believe in the sanctity of life, the tidal pull of love, and the capacity of pure beauty to enchant the eye. These witches use their powers to beguile, charm, and inspire. Many full moon witches are kind and good; others are stark, aloof, and compassionless, idealizing the image of beauty and grace but not the heart of it. When they manifest their power, full moon witches awe allies and enemies alike with the celestial majesty of their presence.

Benefit: 你获得@UUID[Compendium.dnd-4e-compendium.module-powers.0LJWY2sVFK6xPHbt]{光辉降灵术 Glorious Presence}威能。

另外，你在医疗上受训。5级时，你在医疗检定和交涉检定上获得+2加值

占卜术 Augury

Because of their intimate connection with powerful otherworldly entities, witches are well versed in the arcane arts of fortune telling and prophecy. The witch's familiar instructs them in the means to look deep into the spirit world and see the patterns and images that reveal the future. Some learn to read runes, decks of cards, tea leaves, knucklebones, or weather patterns. Some gaze into crystal balls or boiling cauldrons, and some channel spirits directly into their bodies, which foretell the future. As a witch, your method of prophecy might be one of these or it could be a ritual of your own devising. Witches are said to achieve the most favorable results beneath the light of the moon.

Wizard (Mage) Class.name: 法师 Wizard (Mage)
Wizard (Mage) Class.description:
Role: 。You are a master of the mystic arts, capable of bending your enemies to your will, reshaping perception, or summoning devastating elemental power.

Power Source:

Key Abilities: 智力；体质、感知或魅力

Armor Proficiencies: 布甲

Weapon Proficiencies: 匕首，木棍

Implement: 法珠，法杖，魔杖

Bonus to Defense: +2意志

Hit Points at 1st Level: 10 + 体质值

Hit Points per Level Gained: 4

Healing Surges per Day: 6 + 体质调整值

Trained Skills: 神秘。1级时，从下列职业技能列表中，再选择3个受训技能。

Class Skills: 神秘(Int)，交涉(Cha)，地城(Wis)，历史(Int)，洞察(Wis)，自然(Wis)，宗教(Int)

 

属于法师的一种

学派法师是专业化的法师，一种专精于一个特定魔法学派的施法者。这种专业化使得每种学派法师都互不相同。毕竟，一个施放塑能法术的施法者和一个施放幻术或者惑控法术的施法者很容易区分出来。

一言以蔽之，和一般的法师不同之处在于，学派法师倾向于以学术的角度来研究奥术知识。你不大可能在布满灰尘的高塔里遇到一个学派法师。他们亲历地下城和古代遗迹，只是为了增进知识和对奥术技艺的理解，结果也因此增强了个人的实力。

这种远古的学派传统甚至在一开始研究奥术时就被制定出来了。最开始是师徒制的传授，慢慢发展出合作式的研究，最终奥术学院在世界各地开花结果，甚至在精灵荒野的雅灵中间都开始传播。终于，那种在高塔里的某个天才单独研习奥术的方式，被一种在一个塑能学院和幻术学院相邻的综合学院里学习魔法的方式，淘汰了。

今天，你能学到何种法术学派取决你的地点，像瀑上镇这样的小地方，一个学院法师能同时收一两个学徒。但在Nera城这样的地方，在学院里可以得到所有学派的专业的训练。

 

魔法学派

Mages dabble in a wide variety of arcane magic, gaining flexibility at the expense of the deeper understanding of a single type of magic that some wizards cultivate. However, every mage has a natural aptitude for certain magical forms that influence his or her mastery of arcane spellcraft.

Wizard spells are organized into schools—techniques and methods that have been developed over time to produce certain types of magical effects. The schools of magic are categories into which some wizard spells are divided.

一共有下列魔法学派可选择

 

 

1级：学徒级学派法师 Apprentice Mage

Mages are widely known as generalists among wizards, learning spells from various schools to suit their needs and whims. However, even mages understand the benefit derived from specialized study.

Benefit: 选择一种魔法学派。你获得与此学派相关联的「学徒级学派法师」收益

1级：学派法师法术书 Mage's Spellbook

A spellbook is the heart of a mage's power. Your spellbook holds the most powerful spells you know and gives you unrivaled versatility.

Benefit: 每次在你的长休息结束的时候，你可以从你的法术书中准备遭遇攻击威能、每日攻击威能和辅助威能。这些就是你一天中你能使用的威能，此外还包括你的随意攻击威能、戏法和非法师威能（譬如种族威能或来自典范之道或传奇天命的威能）。如果你在长休息结束后没有从你的法术书准备威能（例如你无法接触你的法术书），你可以使用你前一天准备的威能。

从每日法术准备表中找到你的等级。对应的那行指明了你每天可以准备的遭遇攻击威能、每日攻击威能和辅助威能的数量。你在同一天中不能准备超过一个的同等级的遭遇攻击威能、每日攻击威能或辅助威能。例如，一个选择高深学派法师典范之道的14级的学派法师每天可以准备三个遭遇攻击威能。她的法术书中包含各种等级的多个遭遇攻击威能。她可以准备三个任何等级的遭遇攻击威能，只要这些威能的等级各不相同。除了这三个威能，她还可以使用与她的学派相关联的高深学派法师遭遇威能

1级：学派法师戏法 Mage Cantrips

The basic tricks of magic are known as cantrips, and they are the first spells that a beginning wizard learns. The formula underlying a cantrip is so simple that each cantrip can be committed to memory and used at will once you have mastered it.

Benefit: 你获得由你选择的下列威能中的3个威能。

@UUID[Compendium.dnd-4e-compendium.module-powers.Q9sdLbYDN8AzoFIg]{幻音术 Ghost Sound}，@UUID[Compendium.dnd-4e-compendium.module-powers.SVp1oFkrs86Yej3x]{光亮术 Light}，@UUID[Compendium.dnd-4e-compendium.module-powers.WxsfPqu81ChQFbgp]{法师之手 Mage Hand}，@UUID[Compendium.dnd-4e-compendium.module-powers.yZkHUON0LiCXxvsA]{魔法技俩 Prestidigitation}

@UUID[Compendium.dnd-4e-compendium.module-powers.8dcEOv70b1VxBmSt]{暗示术 Suggestion}

@UUID[Compendium.dnd-4e-compendium.module-powers.hGIyp75Qexufc2dj]{破坏不死 Disrupt Undead}，@UUID[Compendium.dnd-4e-compendium.module-powers.ZkzBfnGwPAs1cQlJ]{恐吓 Spook}

@UUID[Compendium.dnd-4e-compendium.module-powers.JkfBSayAN0MgTwKn]{变色龙假面 Chameleon's Mask}

@UUID[Compendium.dnd-4e-compendium.module-powers.Ozyv8Tg4EW01Bthu]{踏水术 Water Stride}，@UUID[Compendium.dnd-4e-compendium.module-powers.jhrXZSztvdflBDJY]{风语术 Whispering Wind}

1级：魔法飞弹 Magic Missile

Every mage learns this spell as part of his or her arcane studies. What magic missile lacks in strength, it compensates for with unparalleled accuracy. Neither the heaviest armor nor the toughest hide offers any defense against this spell.

Benefit: 你获得@UUID[Compendium.dnd-4e-compendium.module-powers.cbtqxoID79mOJS6u]{魔法飞弹 Magic Missile}威能

1级：随意威能 At-Will Powers

From the very first days of your training, you felt arcane power come alive within you. In combat, you protect yourself now with that power, unleashing attacks as deadly as any weapon.

Benefit: 你获得2个1级法师随意攻击威能

1级：遭遇威能 Encounter Powers

Your at-will attack powers are the most accessible part of your arcane arsenal. However, they represent only a small portion of your increasing power.

Benefit: 你选择2个1级法师遭遇攻击威能加入到你的法术书里

1级：每日威能 Daily Powers

Your most potent spells drain you each time they are channeled and released. These are your daily attack powers—arcane magic so devastating that only an extended rest can replenish it.

Benefit: 你选择2个1级法师每日攻击威能加入到你的法术书里

2级：辅助威能 Utility Power

Success in battle is seldom a matter of unlimited offense. Your utility spells unleash no deadly power against your foes. However, the boons they grant can easily tip the balance of combat in your favor.

Benefit: 你选择2个2级法师辅助威能加入到你的法术书里

3级：遭遇威能 Encounter Powers

Every adventure you undertake grants you greater insight into your arcane power, expanding the scope and range of your encounter attack powers.

Benefit: 你选择2个3级或更低级的新法师遭遇攻击威能加入到你的法术书里

4级：属性值增加 Ability Score Increase

Your constant training hones your body and mind.

Benefit: 你选择的两个属性值都增加1点

4级：学徒级学派法师 Apprentice Mage

As a mage, you prefer a breadth of study to specialized expertise.

Benefit: 选择一种与你1级所选择的不同的魔法学派。你获得与你第二学派相关联的「学徒级学派法师」收益

5级：专家级学派法师 Expert Mage

Your focus on a specific school of magic grants you benefits beyond your spellcasting prowess.

Benefit: 选择一种你已有此学派的「学徒级学派法师」收益的魔法学派。你获得与选择的学派相关联的「专家级学派法师」收益

5级：每日威能 Daily Power

As you ascend through the heroic tier, you add to the repertoire of your most potent daily attack powers.

Benefit: 你选择2个5级或更低级的新法师每日攻击威能加入到你的法术书里

6级：辅助威能 Utility Power

Even as your combat magic steadily improves, your repertoire of utility powers grants you increased effectiveness both in and out of combat.

Benefit: 你选择2个6级或更低级的新法师辅助威能加入到你的法术书里

7级：遭遇威能 Encounter Power

Whether enchantment, evocation, or illusion is your focus, your mastery of battle magic continues to improve.

Benefit: 你选择2个法师7级或更低级的新遭遇攻击威能加入到你的法术书里

8级：属性值增加 Ability Score Increase

You reap the reward of constant challenge by increasing your physical and mental well-being.

Benefit: 你选择的两个属性值都增加1点

8级：专家级学派法师 Expert Mage

The magic of your chosen schools continues to hone and shape your expertise with skills.

Benefit: 你获得与你已有此学派的「学徒级学派法师」收益的第二魔法学派相关联的「专家级学派法师」收益。

9级：每日威能 Daily Power

As you near the apex of the heroic tier, the magical attacks you master become more powerful than you could have ever dreamed.

Benefit: 你选择2个9级或更低级的新法师每日攻击威能加入到你的法术书里

10级：大师级学派法师 Master Mage

At the height of the heroic tier, your refined knowledge of magic grants additional power to spells of a chosen school.

Benefit: 选择一种你已有此学派的「专家级学派法师」收益的魔法学派。你获得与选择的学派相关联的「大师级学派法师」收益

10级：辅助威能 Utility Power

You shape the most powerful magic of the heroic tier, channeling power that lets you and your allies own the battlefield.

Benefit: 你选择2个10级或更低级的新法师辅助威能加入到你的法术书里

 

 

11级：属性值增加 Ability Score Increase

Your improved physical and mental prowess highlights your entrance into the paragon tier.

Benefit: 你的每个属性值都增加1点

11级：典范之道特性 Paragon Path Feature

Benefit: 你获得与你的典范之道关联的特性

11级：典范之道威能 Paragon Path Power

Benefit: 你获得与你的典范之道关联的威能

12级：典范之道威能 Paragon Path Power

Benefit: 你获得与你的典范之道关联的威能

13级：遭遇威能 Encounter Power

The power of the paragon tier exceeds anything you have wielded before, but you are up to the challen

Wizard (Sha'ir) Class.name: 法师 Wizard (Sha'ir)
Wizard (Sha'ir) Class.description:
Role: 。Using magic granted by your gen servant, you take control of the battlefield with the raw forces of elemental energy.

Power Source:

Key Abilities: 智力，体质

Armor Proficiencies: 布甲

Weapon Proficiencies: 匕首、木棍

Implement: 法珠，法杖，魔杖

Bonus to Defense: +2意志

Hit Points at 1st Level: 10 + 体质值

Hit Points per Level Gained: 4

Healing Surges per Day: 6 + 体质调整值

Trained Skills: 神秘。1级时，从下列职业技能列表中，再选择3个受训技能。

Class Skills: 神秘(Int)、交涉(Cha)、地城(Wis)、历史(Int)、洞察(Wis)、自然(Wis)、宗教(Int)

 

属于法师的一种

Sha'irs cull magical energy from the Elemental Chaos to power their spells. Rather than pore over ancient formulas and techniques, these wizards bargain with elemental powers for the magical knowledge they need. Sha'irs do not deal directly with these powers; instead, they rely on proxies, elemental spirits called gen servants, to negotiate on their behalf. Dispatching these servants to the Elemental Chaos each day, a sha'ir replenishes the necessary power and information to wield the forces of creation.

Their unconventional methods, combined with their reputation for consorting with dangerous, often violent, powers, place sha'irs on the fringes of the magical world. Other wizards regard sha'irs with scorn and distrust, believing that they cheat by circumventing the arduous training and research wizards must typically undergo. This mistrust stems from ignorance, however, for even though a sha'ir draws magic from a gen servant, a foundation in arcane training is necessary to wield the power he or she gains.

Since sha'irs do not clutter their minds with mystical formulas and arcane utterances, they have wider access to spells than other wizards enjoy. They need only know a spell's basic structure to request it from their gen servants. The gen servant then vanishes into the Elemental Chaos, where it bargains with more powerful elemental lords and creatures to acquire the spell the sha'ir seeks and then returns without fail to provide its master with the energy and means to cast the spell. So even though sha'irs do not employ spellbooks, they have access to the full expanse of wizards' most powerful and versatile spells.

The elemental powers that lend magical knowledge and energy to sha'irs do not do so without an expectation of recompense. Sha'irs often take up the adventurer's life for this reason. They work in the world and beyond as representatives, agents, and servants of their elemental masters. Many times a sha'ir does not even realize that his or her actions are furthering some elemental being's designs, and what might seem to be a normal expedition into the unknown could have consequences not realized for years to come.

 

创建一个元素法师

元素使是法师中的一种。要创建一个元素使，使用万律书或玩家手册里的角色创建规则。

元素法师不具备PH中下列这些秘法师职业特性：「精通奥术法器」，「戏法」，「仪式施法」，和「秘法师法术书」。

作为替代，元素法师获得「灵魔仆从」，「元素法师戏法」，和「元素抗力」职业特性

 

元素法师职业特性

元素法师具有下列职业特性。

灵魔仆从 Gen Servant

Elemental magic bows to no mortal master. Only those steeped in elemental energy or who can broker with the elemental powers can coax forth its magic. You enlist the aid of a minor elemental spirit, a gen servant, to keep you supplied with the magical energy you need to cast your spells. Each day, you dispatch this servant to the Elemental Chaos to steal, beg, or borrow this energy from the greater powers residing there. When the servant returns, the energy it brings back floods into your mind.

A gen servant is an arcane familiar forged from your own essence and that of elemental substance until it adopts a fixed and permanent form. As with any familiar, the characteristics that your gen servant takes on depend on you. The familiar might just be an extension of your magical abilities, or it might develop a distinctive personality, aiding you with knowledge from the Plane Below. How large a part your servant plays in your adventures is up to you.

Benefit: 你获得奥术魔宠 <魔宠> Arcane Familiar 专长作为额外专长。你可以选择任何适用于法师的魔宠，也可以选择只适用于元素法师的魔宠（详情如下）

在每次长休息结束时，当你的魔宠从冒险中回到元素混沌时，你能将你的一个法师每日攻击威能或法师辅助威能替换成同类型的另一个法师威能。新威能必须具有等级，且等级必须和替换前的威能等级一致

土魔 Daolanin

Stoic to the point of rudeness, daolanin tend to be dour and ill-tempered companions. They prefer the truth, even when that truth cuts like a knife. Daolanin are squat creatures with brown or gray skin, dark hair, and brutish features. They are strong and fierce in battle and prove adept at keeping enemies at bay.

风魔 Djinnling

The mercurial djinnlings often have unpredictable personalities. They are quick to anger, but quicker to forget, tending to drift through many moods with little warning or reason. Djinnlings are short, thin humanoids with blue skin and tousled white hair. They are swift servants, and they can use the winds as weapons to disperse your enemies.

炎魔 Efreetkin

The aggressive and malicious efreetkin resemble their larger cousins in both appearance and temperament. With fiery hair, ruddy skin, and small horns sprouting from their brows, they look like little devils and often behave as such. They delight in causing mischief and are famous for causing trouble for their masters. Despite this tendency, efreetkin are potent allies in battle, and many sha'irs tolerate their wickedness because of the power they offer.

水魔 Maridan

The playful maridans are a good-natured servants, friendly and personable. They are creatures of elemental water, and their green skin and blue hair help them blend into the depths. Though their spirits are often high, maridans are easily dismayed and might become uncooperative or angry when threatened. Maridans are thought to be the most reliable of allies, and their influence on the battlefield can slow enemies and interfere with their attacks.

元素法师戏法 Sha'ir Cantrips

The magic provided by a shair's gen servant hints at the power to come, yet the sha'ir must first master the elementary, minor spells before attempting greater feats.

Benefit: 你获得由你选择的下列威能中的4个威能。

@UUID[Compendium.dnd-4e-compendium.module-powers.Q9sdLbYDN8AzoFIg]{幻音术 Ghost Sound}，@UUID[Compendium.dnd-4e-compendium.module-powers.SVp1oFkrs86Yej3x]{光亮术 Light}，@UUID[Compendium.dnd-4e-compendium.module-powers.WxsfPqu81ChQFbgp]{法师之手 Mage Hand}，@UUID[Compendium.dnd-4e-compendium.module-powers.yZkHUON0LiCXxvsA]{魔法技俩 Prestidigitation}

@UUID[Compendium.dnd-4e-compendium.module-powers.8dcEOv70b1VxBmSt]{暗示术 Suggestion}

@UUID[Compendium.dnd-4e-compendium.module-powers.hGIyp75Qexufc2dj]{破坏不死 Disrupt Undead}，@UUID[Compendium.dnd-4e-compendium.module-powers.ZkzBfnGwPAs1cQlJ]{恐吓 Spook}

@UUID[Compendium.dnd-4e-compendium.module-powers.JkfBSayAN0MgTwKn]{变色龙假面 Chameleon's Mask}

@UUID[Compendium.dnd-4e-compendium.module-powers.Ozyv8Tg4EW01Bthu]{踏水术 Water Stride}，@UUID[Compendium.dnd-4e-compendium.module-powers.jhrXZSztvdflBDJY]{风语术 Whispering Wind}

元素抗力 Elemental Resistance

As you and your familiar harvest magic from the Elemental Chaos, you learn to protect yourselves and your companions from elemental damage.

Benefit: 在每次长休息结束时，选择强酸，寒冰，火焰，闪电，或雷鸣。直到你下一次长休息结束，当你的魔宠处于主动模式下，你和你的盟友邻近它时，你们具有等同于你体质调整值的对该伤害类型的抗力。21级时，此抗力值增加为2倍你体质调整值

Runepriest Class.name: 符文牧师 Runepriest
Runepriest Class.description:
Role: 。你唤起的符文能为盟友注入生命与活力，让敌人空门大开。视你选择的职业特性与威能，你的第二职位倾向于防御者或控制者。

Power Source: 。你是神术符文的大师，这是形成神力基础的一种强力字符。其他的符文结构也存在，但你掌握的是神之符文

Key Abilities: 力量，体质，感知

Armor Proficiencies: 布甲，皮甲，革甲，链甲，鳞甲；轻盾

Weapon Proficiencies: 简易近战，简易远程

Bonus to Defense: +2意志

Hit Points at 1st Level: 12 + 体质值

Hit Points per Level Gained: 5

Healing Surges per Day: 7 + 体质调整值

Trained Skills: 宗教。1级时，从下列职业技能列表中，再选择3个受训技能。

Class Skills: 神秘(Int)、运动(Str)、坚韧(Con)、医疗(Wis)，历史(Int)，洞察(Wis)，宗教(Int)，贼活(Dex)

 

「威力神符比钢铁更强大，比魔法更致命。」
