Psion Class.name: 心灵术士 Psion
Psion Class.description:
Role: 。你能在意识上影响你敌人的行动，也可用灵能之力让敌人在战场上颠来倒去。

Power Source: 。你从自己的脑海中引导灵能之力，通过冥想和沉思专注于威能。你的魔力作用于其他生物的头脑，或者也能以世界上的物理之力展露你的意愿。

Key Abilities: 智力，魅力，感知

Armor Proficiencies: 布甲

Weapon Proficiencies: 简易近战，简易远程

Implement: 法珠，法杖

Bonus to Defense: +2意志

Hit Points at 1st Level: 12 + 体质值

Hit Points per Level Gained: 4

Healing Surges per Day: 6 + 体质调整值

Trained Skills: 1级时，从下列职业技能列表中，选择4个受训技能。

Class Skills: 神秘(Int)，唬骗(Cha)，交涉(Cha)，地城(Wis)，历史(Int)，洞察(Wis)，威吓(Cha)，侦查(Wis)

 

「无论凡人或不朽存在之渴望，皆能任吾之意弯折。」

Psions are the quintessential manipulators of psionic power. Psions unleash the potential locked within every conscious mind, move objects with just a thought, and assume command of even the least desire of their foes. Psions make manifest their secret wishes when others can only dream.

You know the mental pathways that lead to amazing edifices of altered reality. You could be a brash human youth flush with your mental ability's first flowering, a tattooed cenobite enrolled in a secret psionic academy, a fey enchanter using ancient techniques to beguile your foes, or perhaps a specially trained inquisitor who has learned one secret too many.

A flare of mental energy warms you, the thoughts of friends and foes glitter like stars all about you, and your thoughts themselves are weapons half sheathed. If a god can reshape the world and you can enthrall a god, what does that make you?

心灵术士简介

角色特性: 挥舞着你心灵的力量，你对敌人释放出灵能之力。你的威能允许你以心灵感应之令操纵敌人意志，仰或以心灵念动之爆分隔一群敌人。你能通过使用灵能点来强化你的随意威能，由此提供给你比其他许多职业更多的选择。

信仰: 知识之神艾恩通常被认为是灵能魔法的保护者，因此许多心灵术士崇拜她。通过欺瞒敌人为生的心灵感应术士通常追随瑟翰妮，而将操纵灵能魔法视为艺术的心灵术士则通常向柯瑞隆祈祷。其他的心灵术士可能根据职业之外的理想来选择崇拜之神：强烈尊崇正义的心灵术士可能信仰巴哈姆特，希望得到文明之力的心灵术士则信仰伊拉西斯。邪恶的心灵术士（以及一些无阵营的）通常俯跪在维克那，秘密之神的座下。

种族: 灵能之力在人类之中最为普遍，他们能快速发掘自己身上的灵能天赋，无论多么微弱。然而许多精类冒险者用灵能之力来欺骗和迷惑敌人，例如侏儒和雅灵就是常见的心灵念动术士。可能由于他们残忍血统的表达，提夫林也享受着操纵敌人的精神。

 

心灵术士职业特性

心灵术士具有下列职业特性。

能系专攻 Discipline Focus

心灵术士专注于他们对于圆满或者理解某个特殊的概念以及展现灵能之力的研究和冥想。选择下列一个选项。你的选择代表了你的专注方向。

心灵念动 Telekinesis Focus: 你获得@UUID[Compendium.dnd-4e-compendium.module-powers.nHOLX6Z5qB7GwWps]{远距之手 Far Hand}和@UUID[Compendium.dnd-4e-compendium.module-powers.JgaBVFHOyf35UqPu]{强迫之推 Forceful Push}这两项威能

心灵感应 Telepathy Focus: 你获得@UUID[Compendium.dnd-4e-compendium.module-powers.NYHZRPjx2pz1hyaB]{分心术 Distract}和@UUID[Compendium.dnd-4e-compendium.module-powers.AI34U6fMz97FHVqn]{传心术 Send Thoughts}这两项威能。

心灵塑形 Shaper Focus（PsP）: 你获得@UUID[Compendium.dnd-4e-compendium.module-powers.MACh3P79yZDqkVW2]{意识具现 Shaped Consciousness}和@UUID[Compendium.dnd-4e-compendium.module-powers.SRkTznLd237VKeW4]{次级造物 Minor Creation}这两项威能。

灵能强化 Psionic Augmentation

通过训练和谨慎的研究，你已经掌握了比其他角色掌控的威能更具灵活性的一种灵能魔法。你了解一大堆随意威能，你可以随意注入不等量的灵能之力来引导威能。你将灵能之力导入个人的灵能池中——在游戏中以灵能点表示——凭借于此，你可以用于强化你的随意攻击威能，以此代替其他角色使用的遭遇威能。

由于这种特殊的职业特性，你获得和使用威能的方式与其他大多数职业的方式有微小的区别。

随意攻击威能： 1级时，你从你的职业选择两个随意攻击威能和一个每日攻击威能，但你没有从这个职业获得任何遭遇攻击威能。相对的，你可以使用灵能点来强化你的职业随意攻击威能。这些威能都有可强化关键字。

当你升级时，你从职业中获得新的随意攻击威能而不是新的遭遇攻击威能。3级时，你从这个职业中选择一个新的随意攻击威能。在7，13，17，23和27级时，你可以用一个与你同等级或更低级的随意攻击威能来替换你当前的一个随意攻击威能。这些威能必须都是可强化威能，而且属于这个职业。

灵能点: 在起始时，你有2个灵能点。在3，7，17，21，23，27级时，你获得额外2个灵能点。在13级时，你获得额外1个灵能点。如果你从其他来源获得灵能点（例如你的典范之道），则将它们加到你的灵能点总数上。你可以用你的灵能点来强化你拥有的任何可强化威能，无论你是怎么获得这个威能的。

在一个短休息或长休息后，你恢复所有的灵能点。

仪式施法 Ritual Casting

你获得仪式施法者 Ritual Caster专长作为奖励专长，允许你使用魔法仪式（见玩家手册的第十章）。你获得一本仪式书。选择传讯术 Sending或者谭森飘浮碟 Tenser's Floating Disk。你的书中包含了这项仪式，且你可以每日不消耗材料施展此仪式一次。此仪式书同时包含了一个你选择的1级仪式。

 

法器

心灵术士借助法珠和法杖来将灵能之力聚集于威能之中。当你持用一件魔法法珠或法杖时，你能将它的增强加值加到心灵术士或心灵术士典范的拥有法器关键字的威能的攻击骰和伤害骰上。没有法器，你也能施展这些威能。

 

心灵术士威能

你的心灵术士威能被称为灵律。你深入探寻你的心灵之源来影响周遭的世界，以及世界之中敌人的知觉。

Seeker Class.name: 巡者 Seeker
Seeker Class.description:
Role: 。你是原始的猎手，与谜样的精魂铸下束约，使它在你追寻猎物时助你一臂之力。根据你所选择的职业特性，你的第二职位倾向于防御者或打击者。

Power Source: 。透过古老的仪式与低语的呼唤，你唤来原初的精魂，并借助它们的力量来完成你的目标。

Key Abilities: 感知，力量，敏捷

Armor Proficiencies: 布甲，皮甲

Weapon Proficiencies: 简易近战，简易远程，军用远程

Bonus to Defense: +1反射，+1意志

Hit Points at 1st Level: 12 + 体质值

Hit Points per Level Gained: 5

Healing Surges per Day: 7 + 体质调整值

Trained Skills: 自然。1级时，从下列职业技能列表中，再选择3个受训技能。

Class Skills: 杂技(Dex)，运动(Str)，坚韧(Con)，医疗(Wis)，洞察(Wis)，威吓(Cha)，自然(Wis)，侦查(Wis)，隐秘(Dex)

 

「我即雷电轰鸣，大地震荡，汪洋万变。你的毁灭，将由我来赐予。」

Seekers are primal champions who scour the wilderness in search of those who would defile it. Versed in hunting techniques handed down through the generations, seekers combine thrown weapon and bow techniques with primal evocations. The combination allows seekers great range in which to deliver deadly attacks that confound and hamper their enemies. When a seeker looses a missile, the primal spirits bound to it through ancient evocations are freed, sometimes as terrifying beasts and sometimes as nature's raw destructive potential.

As a seeker, you are both a hunter and a mystic. You attune yourself to the wilderness you call your home, but you are equally tied to the spirits that dwell in the world around you. With your people's traditions and whispered advice from the spirits, you navigate the wilds with ease, at home in that environment as any beast. If an enemy appears, you have nothing to fear, both because you have mastered your weapons and because the spirits to whom you have bound yourself add their savage might to your attacks. Whether you use lightning strikes, grasping vines, or spectral beasts, your enemies cannot stand against your assault.

巡者简介

角色特性: Your arrows or thrown weapons loose primal power when used. They might manifest as primal spirits hungering for revenge or as icy winds or crackling lightning. Your powers control your enemies, interfering with their movement, holding them in place, or injuring them for their actions. Also, your attacks might call forth spirits to worry your enemies and pursue them across the battlefield.

信仰: Like other primal characters, seekers view the world's primal spirits as kindred and partners, and they venerate them more than they worship the gods. Seekers who do follow deities commonly worship Melora for her dominion over the forces of nature, Corellon (who is sometimes depicted as the founder of archery), Kord, or Sehanine. Evil seekers sometimes follow Gruumsh or Zehir.

种族: Elves and shifters are the most common seekers, since both their natural inclinations toward primal paths and their inherent abilities make them well matched with the capabilities of the class. Goliaths who favor ranged combat sometimes become seekers (preferring thrown weapons over bows or crossbows), and wilden seekers are also fairly common.

 

巡者职业特性

巡者具有下列职业特性。

必中飞矢 Inevitable Shot

你获得@UUID[Compendium.dnd-4e-compendium.module-powers.xey7HMjREThuc106]{必中飞矢 Inevitable Shot}威能。你可以在你的远程攻击失手时，使用此威能唤来精魂，让你的箭矢再次朝另一个敌人呼啸而去。

巡者束约 Seeker's Bond

Seekers develop special bonds with primal spirits by offering solemn vows to further the spirits' purposes. In exchange for these vows, the spirits bestow a measure of their strength to aid their champions' cause.

选择下列一个选项。你的选择会给特定的巡者威能提供增益，具体见威能描述

鲜血束约 Bloodbond: 你获得@UUID[Compendium.dnd-4e-compendium.module-powers.m2ziLRKD7OWvNCwy]{缚敌精魂 Encaging Spirits}威能。此外，如果你未穿着重甲，则你可以用一个次要动作进行快步。

灵魂束约 Spiritbond: 你获得@UUID[Compendium.dnd-4e-compendium.module-powers.XIYGqCLT83QdZz4h]{精魂斥喝 Spirits' Rebuke}威能。你在用轻投或是重投武器作出攻击时，你在攻击骰上获得+1加值。同时，当你以投掷你擅长的武器进行攻击时，此武器在该攻击结束后会自动回到你手中。此外，当你并未穿着重甲时，你可以使用你的力量调整值代替敏捷或智力调整值来计算你的AC。

 

巡者威能

Your powers are evocations gained from the bonds you forge with primal spirits. Unlike most other controllers, you use weapons to direct your spirit allies and their destructive wrath, launching arrows or throwing other ranged weapons into your enemies' midst, only to watch your weapons explode in scorching lightning or booming thunder. Your attacks can also herald the appearance of the spirits themselves, calling them forth to assail your enemies.

Barbarian Class.name: 野蛮人 Barbarian
Barbarian Class.description:
Role: 。你用强力的双手武器来对敌人造成严重伤害。你强悍的体力和恐怖的形象令对手在你面前止步不前，同时你可以通过激发恐怖狂暴的爆发来获得短暂的能力提升。通过对职业特性和威能的不同选择，你的第二职位倾向于防御者或领导者。

Power Source: 。你是天生斗士，你是献身于自然世界的武者，你是你的部族勇猛传统的化身。

Key Abilities: 力量，体质，魅力

Armor Proficiencies: 布甲，皮甲，革甲

Weapon Proficiencies: 简易近战，军用近战

Bonus to Defense: +2强韧

Hit Points at 1st Level: 15 + 体质值

Hit Points per Level Gained: 6

Healing Surges per Day: 8 + 体质调整值

Trained Skills: 1级时，从下列职业技能列表中，选择3个受训技能。

Class Skills: 杂技(Dex)，运动(Str)，坚韧(Con)，医疗(Wis)，威吓(Cha)，自然(Wis)，侦查(Wis)

 

「荒野狂怒即吾力量！」

野蛮人是运用强力武器造成大威力打击的野性斗士。他们向一个又一个的敌人发动冲锋，几乎感觉不到敌人的攻击所带来的痛苦。作为野蛮人的对手们，当野蛮人唤起蛮荒之力，将其威能导向自身的狂暴精魂时，最恐怖的时刻来临了。这些狂暴威能虽然短暂，却能给予野蛮人难以置信的威力，这种威力是技能、意志力和古老的部族仪式传承的结合。

作为一个野蛮人，你与强悍的自然精魂以及你的部族勇士们的洪荒之力联为一体，这种联结通过歌谣和图腾传承与你。这些精魂通过狂暴赋予你能量，将你变成战场上的屠戮机器。当你逐渐经验丰富后，这些狂暴力量将突破凡人的局限，直接表现为元素力量的怒涛，或是令你拥有超自然的回复力。

当炽热的战火降临，你将如何应对？是突然冲向对手，猛然挥出自己的武器，还是启动一次延长的狂暴，令你醒来时只会看到倒下的敌人？

野蛮人简介

角色特性: 你将强有力的近战攻击和卓越的吸收伤害的能力结合起来。你从强大的狂暴中获得威力的巨大爆发。你的角色有着超乎寻常的高HP点数，使得你比其他的打击者更有耐力。

信仰: 多数野蛮人尊崇自然世界的原始精魂，而不是去呼喊星海众神的姓名。有些野蛮人看不到神祗与原始精魂的冲突所在，于是在原始精魂之外同样也尊崇那些自然或战争的神祇。这些野蛮人常常崇拜寇德、 梅洛拉、艾梵德拉、或鸦后，邪恶或是混乱邪恶的野蛮人则投向格乌什，或者，尽管非常少见，崇敬班恩或泽希尔。

种族: 歌利亚斯是理想的狂血野蛮人。龙裔则是出色的贵胄野蛮人。半兽人经常成为野蛮人，但通常不在两种典型类型之列。矮人和半兽化人一般都是狂血野蛮人，而半身人和半精灵野蛮人则选择贵胄野蛮人作为成长之路。

 

野蛮人职业特性

野蛮人具有下列职业特性。

蛮族机敏 Barbarian Agility

当你未穿着重甲时，你在AC和反射上获得+1加值。这个加值在11级时为+2，21级时为+3。

野性力量 Feral Might

野蛮人通过各种途径与自然世界联系在一起。有些野蛮人是如此坚强以至于他们认为吸纳物理伤害比躲避它更为简便。另一些则遵循意志塑造命运的典范而生存。

在下列选项中选择其一。你所作出的选择将给与你如下描述所带来的益处，同时还给某些野蛮人威能提供增益，详见具体威能描述。

狂血活力 Rageblood Vigor: 你获得@UUID[Compendium.dnd-4e-compendium.module-powers.TPHD01srzA4i6Oeo]{灵活冲锋 Swift Charge}威能。此外，当你的攻击将一个敌人的生命值降至0时，你获得等同于你体质调整值的临时生命值。此临时生命值在11级时为5 + 你体质调整值，21级时为10 + 你体质调整值。

贵胄胜典 Thaneborn Triumph: 你获得@UUID[Compendium.dnd-4e-compendium.module-powers.Pykg4EZFRKQAJ1uB]{胜利狂吼 Roar of Triumph}威能。此外，当你重伤一个敌人时，你或一个盟友在对该敌人的下一次攻击骰上获得等同于你魅力调整值的加值。

雷鸣之怒 Thunderborn Wrath（PrP）: 你获得@UUID[Compendium.dnd-4e-compendium.module-powers.fMGh2YrCdquExJBg]{战争哀嚎 War Cry}威能。此外，每轮一次，当你的攻击重伤一个敌人时，每个邻近你的敌人受到等同于你体质调整值的雷鸣伤害。

旋刃杀手 Whirling Slayer（PrP）: 你获得@UUID[Compendium.dnd-4e-compendium.module-powers.1N64hoQTEaHw7mik]{旋刃突刺 Whirling Lunge}威能，且你可以在你的副手持用一件单手武器，并将其视为副手武器。此外，每轮一次，当你的攻击重伤一个敌人时，你能以一个自由动作快步2格，且在此快步结束时每个邻近你的敌人给你提供战斗优势直到你下一回合结束。

狂暴打击 Rage Strike

野蛮人的每日攻击威能带有狂暴关键字。这些威能使你能释放出巨大的情绪、意志或者是原始的力量。每个狂暴威能都以一次强有力的攻击为起始，随即你进入一种狂暴状态，这种状态将赋予你一些持续的益处。

5级时，你获得@UUID[Compendium.dnd-4e-compendium.module-powers.GnWJkEwZfgiSPXqM]{狂暴打击 Rage Strike}威能，这使得你在狂暴时可以将一次没有使用的狂暴威能转化为一次威力巨大的致命打击。在一场激烈的战斗中，使用@UUID[Compendium.dnd-4e-compendium.module-powers.GnWJkEwZfgiSPXqM]{狂暴打击 Rage Strike}是使用第二个狂暴威能的一种替代选择；它可以使你输出每日威能的伤害，并且无需进入另一种狂暴状态。

暴殴打 Rampage

每轮一次，当你以野蛮人攻击威能造成重击时，你能立即以一个自由动作做一次近战基本攻击。你并不需要继续攻击被你重击的那个目标。

 

野蛮人威能

你的威能是唤醒原始洪荒的力量。在低等级阶段，你的威能部分地依赖于战斗技能和个人气势，但是从你职业生涯的开始，这世间的自然精魂就将活力注入你的身躯。等级渐高之后，原始的精魂更加自如地流入你和你的武器中，造成更加显著的超自然效果。

你的野蛮人每日攻击威能有狂暴关键字。当你处于狂暴状态时，你的野蛮人随意攻击威能将获得某些额外益处，详见那些威能的具体描述。

Barbarian (Berserker) Class.name: 野蛮人 Barbarian (Berserker)
Barbarian (Berserker) Class.description:
Role: 。你的技能和经验使你擅长保护别人，但当你的怒火燃起，你就会变成极具侵略性的攻击者。

Power Source:

Key Abilities: 力量，敏捷

Armor Proficiencies: 布甲，皮甲，革甲；轻盾

Weapon Proficiencies: 简易近战，军用近战

Bonus to Defense: +2强韧

Hit Points at 1st Level: 15 + 体质值

Hit Points per Level Gained: 6

Healing Surges per Day: 8 + 体质调整值

Trained Skills: 1级时，从下列职业技能列表中，选择3个受训技能。

Class Skills: 杂技(Dex)、运动(Str)、坚韧(Con)、医疗(Wis)、威吓(Cha)、自然(Wis)、侦查(Wis)

 

属于野蛮人 Barbarian的一种

On the edge of civilization, far beyond the comfortable life within cities and towns, tribes of barbarian peoples maintain a simple yet primitive existence. Life for these people is not easy, and it is made more difficult because fey crossings commonly appear in their lands. As children, tribe members are taught about the perils of crossing into the Feywild, and about the monsters that emerge from that realm with malicious intent. Faced with this constant danger, the barbarians continually fight to maintain their way of life.

Some among them have fought so hard for so long that they know little other than violence as a means of protecting their tribes. These individuals, prone to rage that transforms them into whirling forces of destruction, are known as berserkers. Most berserkers are skilled warriors with keen survival instincts. When their ire is stoked, however, much of that experience and discipline is replaced by an animal fury unmatched among other warriors.

If fury and aggressiveness was all that berserkers had to protect them from harm, they would eventually tire and be overcome by their enemies. When the berserkers' unbridled rage overtakes them, they become beacons of the spirit world, and their rage sounds like a gong calling to the primal spirits. Those spirits are drawn to such strong emotion, and are able to inhabit berserkers during their rages, protecting them against harm. The spirits also lend their energy to the berserkers, allowing them to perform incredible, even supernatural, feats.

It is not just barbarians in the mortal world who become berserkers. Within the Feywild are many savage warriors, and that bright realm is a place where warriors who are as mercurial as the berserker fit right in. Many berserkers are found among the lycanthrope tribes of the Brokenstone Vale, others are among the elves who still dwell in the forests of the Feywild, and yet others can be found anywhere civilization has not yet encroached upon.

 

创建一个狂战士

狂战士是野蛮人 Barbarian的一种，野蛮人 Barbarian的信息在PH2中。要创建一个狂战士，使用万律书或玩家手册里的角色创建规则。

狂战士不具备PH2中所有这些野蛮人职业特性：「蛮族机敏」，「野性力量」，@UUID[Compendium.dnd-4e-compendium.module-powers.GnWJkEwZfgiSPXqM]{狂暴打击 Rage Strike}，和「暴殴打」。

狂战士获得新的职业特性：「狂战士狂怒」，@UUID[Compendium.dnd-4e-compendium.module-powers.qPpXEzFWDVgUOxJa]{防御者灵气 Defender Aura}，「故土」，「镇定防御者」，和@UUID[Compendium.dnd-4e-compendium.module-powers.six9CtkW8wSP3EbH]{复仇卫士 Vengeful Guardian}。另外，狂战士擅长轻盾。因为这些新特性，狂战士可以同时胜任防御者和打击者

 

狂战士职业特性

狂战士具有下列职业特性。

狂战士狂怒 Berserker Fury

Though you are a warrior of skill and poise most of the time, when your ire is stoked you become a force of destruction on the battlefield. At times of desperation, or when the scent of your enemies’ blood fills your senses, you fly into a frenzy of rage. While engulfed in this primal rage, you abandon much of your discipline and training, allowing primal spirits to flow into you and assume control.

Benefit: 当你使用野蛮人原力攻击威能时，你进入狂战士狂怒状态直到遭遇结束。或者，当你重伤时你能以一个次要动作进入狂战士狂怒状态。此状态有下列效果

✦你的@UUID[Compendium.dnd-4e-compendium.module-powers.qPpXEzFWDVgUOxJa]{防御者灵气 Defender Aura}结束，如果它激活了的话，且你不能使用@UUID[Compendium.dnd-4e-compendium.module-powers.qPpXEzFWDVgUOxJa]{防御者灵气 Defender Aura}和@UUID[Compendium.dnd-4e-compendium.module-powers.six9CtkW8wSP3EbH]{复仇卫士 Vengeful Guardian}直到此状态结束

✦你的一些威能，例如野蛮人武术随意攻击威能，获得额外增益，在对应的威能中有具体描述

✦你的近战基本攻击造成1d8额外伤害。此额外伤害11级时为2d8，21级时为3d8

防御者灵气 Defender Aura

You've spent a good deal of time engaged in a battle against enemies, natural or otherwise. Your fighting skills are honed to the point where you stand as a capable defender of your people, interposing yourself between enemy and ally.

Benefit: 你获得@UUID[Compendium.dnd-4e-compendium.module-powers.qPpXEzFWDVgUOxJa]{防御者灵气 Defender Aura}威能

故土 Heartland

狂战士生活在文明的边缘，比其他战士更受邻近地带的影响。基于你的故土环境经验你培养出了一些特定能力

你从下列的地形种类中选择最能体现你故土的一个并获得其增益

干燥沙漠 Arid Desert

You hail from a hot, dry desert region and are accustomed to the blistering heat and searing sands of your heartland. Your people prize light protective clothing that keeps you from overheating, and compensate for lighter armor with greater agility.

Benefit: 当你穿着布甲或无甲且未使用盾牌时，你在AC上获得+3加值，在反射上获得+2加值

4级时，你获得5点火焰抗力。此抗力14级时为10点，24级时为15点

冰川冻土 Frozen Land

You hail from a land covered in ice and snow, and as such you know how to survive in cold environments. You are comfortable when others are shivering with cold, and you have become toughened by constant exposure to harsh temperatures.

Benefit: 你在强韧和意志上获得+1加值

4级时，你获得5点寒冰抗力。此抗力14级时为10点，24级时为15点

温带平原 Temperate Land

You hail from a land covered in forests and plains. Your people are accustomed to having access to abundant resources and typically carry defensive gear such as shields.

Benefit: 当你持用单手武器且使用盾牌时，你在以该武器进行的任何武器攻击的伤害骰上获得+2加值

4级时，你冲锋时在速度上获得+1加值

镇定防御者 Poised Defender

As long as your primal rage does not take over, your martial training helps you dodge and parry incoming attacks if you're not burdened by heavy armor.

Benefit: 当你的@UUID[Compendium.dnd-4e-compendium.module-powers.qPpXEzFWDVgUOxJa]{防御者灵气 Defender Aura}激活且你未穿着重甲时，你在AC上获得+2加值

复仇卫士 Vengeful Guardian

Protecting your family while living on the frontier of civilization, or some other uncivilized land, has taught you how to draw attention to yourself and away from those you protect. When an enemy is foolish enough to ignore you and go after your loved ones, you punish it for its oversight.

Benefit: 你获得@UUID[Compendium.dnd-4e-compendium.module-powers.six9CtkW8wSP3EbH]{复仇卫士 Vengeful Guardian}威能

Rogue (Thief) Class.name: 游荡者 Rogue (Thief)
Rogue (Thief) Class.description:
Role: 。Your quick wits and mastery of stealth let you slip past your enemies to strike when they least expect it. You do your best work when teamed with a defender or another striker to flank enemies.

Power Source:

Key Abilities: 敏捷；力量或魅力

Armor Proficiencies: 布甲，皮甲

Weapon Proficiencies: 匕首，手弩，短弓，短剑，投石索

Bonus to Defense: +2反射

Hit Points at 1st Level: 12 + 体质值

Hit Points per Level Gained: 5

Healing Surges per Day: 6 + 体质调整值

Trained Skills: 隐秘和贼活。1级时，从下列职业技能列表中，再选择4个受训技能。

Class Skills: 杂技(Dex)、运动(Str)、唬骗(Cha)、地城(Wis)、洞察(Wis)、威吓(Cha)、侦查(Wis)、隐秘(Dex)、市井(Cha)、贼活(Dex)

 

属于游荡者的一种

A thief specializes in agility and trickery, using hard-earned skills to pilfer and hide, escape from tight situations, and overcome deadly traps. A thief has powerful combat abilities, but relies first and foremost on circumventing an enemy's defenses through acrobatics and stealth. Brute strength and arcane power have their uses, but a thief 's quick reflexes and agile touch can get the drop on enemies before they know what hit them.

Most thief adventurers are explorers and treasure hunters, keen on delving into long-forgotten ruins in the hope of finding valuable lore, treasure, or magic. Many thieves learn their skills on the streets or as unapologetic criminals. However, such characters often develop noble intentions, choosing to steal only from the wealthy or from those in need of being taught a lesson. After all, sometimes bad guys make the best good guys.

 

 

1级：偷袭 Sneak Attack

As a rogue, you fight fair only when you have no other choice. You are at your best when you have the advantage over an enemy, such as when you and an ally attack the foe from opposite sides or you deliver a surprise assault.

Benefit: 当你以轻刃，手弩，短弓或投石索进行一次攻击并命中一个对你提供战斗优势的敌人，此敌人受到基于你等级的额外伤害（参见下表）。你每回合只能造成此额外伤害一次

1级：背刺 Backstab

Since the day you first picked up a blade, you have understood that the best fights are those that end quickly. Sometimes you need to prevent a foe from unleashing its most powerful counterattacks. Sometimes you need to drop an enemy before it can raise an alarm or call for reinforcements. Whenever you gain the advantage, your subtle combat skill ensures that your attack hits home.

Benefit: 你获得@UUID[Compendium.dnd-4e-compendium.module-powers.AI2udgBptHD697Nv]{背刺 Backstab}威能

1级：武器娴熟 Weapon Finesse

To a rogue, speed and elegance are everything. Brute force is the domain of the fighter, not the cunning thief. When you enter into melee, you prefer to rely on agility rather than brawn.

Benefit: 当你进行一次近战基本攻击时，你可使用敏捷替代力量来计算攻击骰和伤害骰。另外，你在使用轻刃，手弩，短弓和投石索进行的武器攻击的伤害骰上获得+2加值

1级：抢先攻击 First Strike

For a thief, a quick fi ght is a good fight. By striking hard in the first few moments of a battle, you press the attack before a sentinel can call for help.

Benefit: 在遭遇开始时，你对此遭遇中任何还未行动的生物具有战斗优势

1级：游荡者技巧 Rogue's Trick

All rogues are masters of trickery. Whether by distracting an enemy with a quick flurry of a rapier, pulling off an acrobatic maneuver that allows a rogue to slip past a foe, or uttering a few honeyed words that drop a creature's defenses, all rogues rely on cunning and wits rather than brute force or heavy armor.

As a thief, you focus on staying in motion. After all, once you have grabbed a treasure, your next goal is to escape. Slaying a treasure's guards is one way to avoid capture, but it is messy, noisy, and liable to create further complications for you. You know how to move quickly to slip past an enemy.

When you must stand and fight, the same talents that make your escape possible prove just as useful. Misdirection opens gaps in an enemy's defenses, while a quick maneuver puts you in the perfect spot to find a gap in a monster's armor.

These tactics and abilities are called tricks. Tricks are powers, usually move actions, that allow you to shift or move and gain an additional benefit. Some tricks grant you a special type of move, such as the ability to run along a wall or shift past an enemy. Their benefits vary from additional damage with your next attack, the ability to knock an enemy prone, or an additional move you can use at the end of your turn to slip away from a foe's grasp. As you gain levels, you learn more tricks.

Benefit: 你选择获得下列威能中的2个

杂技技巧 Acrobat's Trick

A thief must always fi nd a way to surprise an enemy. You rely on light armor and smaller weapons, making a stand-up fight inadvisable. With this trick, you use your speed and balance to approach an enemy or escape along the side of a wall. If you use this trick to lead into an attack, the momentum of this move translates into a more forceful, powerful strike.

伏击技巧 Ambush Trick

An exposed enemy is a far easier target for a sudden feint or bounding maneuver. With this trick, you move or feint with such speed and agility that you throw off its defenses. You might dash by an enemy to stab it in the back, or you feint in one direction, force your enemy to react, and fire an arrow while it is off balance.

逃脱大师技巧 Escape Artist's Trick

This trick allows you to dart in and out of melee, dancing just out of the edge of your opponent's grasp. You can move, attack, and then use a quick maneuver to disengage. This trick is particularly useful when combined with a ranged attack or an ambush, since you can move, attack, move, and then make a Stealth check to hide.

佯攻技巧 Feinting Trick

A feint draws its strength from misdirection. You move one way, but your enemy expects you to move another. You take advantage of this confusion by anticipating it, aiming your next attack at where your foe's back is as he turns in the wrong direction to meet your approach.

潜行技巧 Sneak's Trick

If you can remain out of sight, you can remain out of danger. This trick allows you to make the most of your surroundings. You move slowly, picking your way from shadow to shadow to stay out of sight. Once you fade into the background, you can unleash a deadly attack or slip away unnoticed.

战术技巧 Tactical Trick

Many rogues prefer to work alone, but some see the value in having allies along to serve as convenient distractions. With this trick, you time your movement and your attack perfectly to take advantage of the protection and distraction offered by your friends. As the fighter lifts his shield, you dodge beneath it to avoid a foe. While the cleric hammers at an enemy with her mace, you slip in for a deadly attack.

暴徒技巧 Thug's Trick

Some rogues develop a taste for dishing out punishment. With this trick, you keep a steady eye on an enemy that you have surrounded. The slightest move creates an opening you can exploit, your blade providing a compelling argument for it to stand and face you.

翻滚技巧 Tumbling Trick

Using a combination of speed and strength, you push your way through your enemies and use your momentum to make a quick, whirling attack that cuts through one enemy and into another. This attack is best used when your enemies press in on all sides.

失衡技巧 Unbalancing Trick

A feint can accomplish many things. It can open an enemy's defenses, force the enemy to move, or ruin its balance. This trick twists your enemy around, causing it to lose its balance and footing. This maneuver requires a subtle mix of guile and speed. Because it allows you to maneuver a foe at your whim, it often works best when you use it to set up an enemy for your allies' attacks.

2级：盗贼武器才能 Thief Weapon Talent

As a thief, you favor light weapons that are easy to conceal. Your mastery of such weapons grants you an edge when attacking with them.

Benefit: 你在使用轻刃，手弩，短弓和投石索进行的攻击的攻击骰上获得+1加值

2级：技能精通 Skill Mastery

Thieves and other rogues are unmatched in their ability to use skills. Other warriors view weapons and armor as tools of battle. You draw upon your tools and talents for excellence both in and out of combat.

Benefit: 从以下技能列表选择1个额外受训技能：唬骗，地城，洞察，威吓，侦查，市井。

同时，在一次技能挑战中，当你在一次技能检定上掷出20时（该技能检定会计入此技能挑战的一次或多次成功），该检定自动成功并且视作一次额外成功

你的DM了解更多关于技能挑战的信息

2级：辅助威能 Utility Power

As a thief, you are the master of traps, locks, and acrobatic exploits. In the course of your earliest adventures, you choose which of those talents to hone and perfect.

Benefit: 你获得1个2级或更低级的游荡者辅助威能

3级：进阶背刺 Improved Backstab

Each fight hones your ability to better assess the defenses of your foes. When weakness presents itself, you take full advantage to strike.

Benefit: 你每场遭遇可多使用一次@UUID[Compendium.dnd-4e-compendium.module-powers.AI2udgBptHD697Nv]{背刺 Backstab}威能，但你仍然每回合只能使用一次

Rogue (Scoundrel) Class.name: 游荡者 Rogue (Scoundrel)
Rogue (Scoundrel) Class.description:
Role: 。Cunning and furtive, you maneuver about the battlefield, evading attacks and countering with strikes of your own. You are at your best when you work with a defender to bring down tough opponents or another striker to set up flanking attacks.

Power Source:

Key Abilities: 敏捷；力量或魅力

Armor Proficiencies: 布甲，皮甲

Weapon Proficiencies: 匕首，手弩，短剑，手里剑，投石索

Bonus to Defense: +2反射

Hit Points at 1st Level: 12 + 体质值

Hit Points per Level Gained: 5

Healing Surges per Day: 6 + 体质调整值

Trained Skills: 隐秘和贼活。1级时，从下列职业技能列表中，再选择4个受训技能。

Class Skills: 杂技(Dex)、运动(Str)、唬骗(Cha)、地城(Wis)、洞察(Wis)、威吓(Cha)、侦查(Wis)、隐秘(Dex)、市井(Cha)、贼活(Dex)

 

「看到我很惊讶？若你稍加留意，或许还能活命。」

A fair fight is not in the scoundrel's vocabulary. Scoundrels find success on the battlefield by using every trick at their disposal to deceive, mislead, and ambush their enemies. They draw on their many skills to give them an edge in combat, whether that edge enables them to snatch a treasure from a villain or leap away at the last moment to thwart an attack. Scoundrels are survivors, and they are not above getting their hands dirty to win the day.

A scoundrel relies on clever planning and quick wits to survive. A thief focuses more broadly on acrobatics and unpredictable maneuvers. Scoundrels trade the thief 's reliable tricks for a broader, more unpredictable range of abilities. These martial powers, or exploits, mirror the scoundrel's preferred tactics and arise from a mix of training, improvisation, and skill. Some scoundrels favor punishing exploits, focusing on hitting hard and inflicting terrible injuries. Others use witty banter and feints to frustrate and misdirect opponents. Others still favor acrobatics, menace, or secrecy.

Scoundrels are adventurers first and foremost. One might have learned the trade on the streets, might have developed his or her powers out of necessity after fate betrayed them, or could have been apprenticed to a master thief. Some scoundrels join adventuring parties for the promise of treasure and have few reservations about exploring dusty tombs and labyrinthine dungeons as long as there's a reward on the other side. Not all scoundrels are that mercenary, however. There are things other than loot that are worth fighting for.

 

恶棍职业特性

恶棍具有下列职业特性。

偷袭 Sneak Attack

当你使用轻刃、短弓、手弩或投石索的攻击命中一个给你提供战斗优势的敌人时，该敌人会受到基于你等级的额外伤害（参见下表）。每回合只能造成此额外伤害一次。

抢先攻击 First Strike

在遭遇开始时，你对所有在此遭遇上还未行动的生物具有战斗优势。

游荡者战术 Rogue Tactics

从下列选项中选择一个。

狡诈贱客 Artful Dodger: 你在对抗借机攻击的AC上获得等同于你的魅力调整值的加值。

无情暴徒 Brutal Scoundrel: 你在「偷袭」伤害上获得等同于你的力量调整值的加值。

残忍歹徒 Ruthless Ruffian（MP）: 你获得木棒和硬头锤（单个武器）的擅长。你可以使用这些武器进行「偷袭」或者任何需要使用轻刃才能发动的游荡者威能或游荡者典范之道威能。如果你使用木棒或硬头锤发动一个带有厉喝关键字的攻击，则在此攻击的伤害骰上获得等同于你力量调整值的加值。

灵巧躲藏者 Cunning Sneak（MP2）: 你不会因为移动多于2格而在隐秘检定上受到减值，而且你在奔跑时只在隐秘检定上承受-5减值而不是-10减值。

如果你结束移动时距离开始的位置最少3格远，则你可以进行一次隐秘检定进入隐藏只要你有任何隐蔽或掩护，不过你不能使用处于你和对方中间的盟友所提供的掩护。

恶棍武器天赋 Scoundrel Weapon Talent

当你持用手里剑时，武器伤害骰提升一级（如d4升级为d6）。另外你在使用匕首的武器攻击骰上获得+1加值。

狙击手天赋 Sharpshooter Talent（MP2）

此职业特性会替代「恶棍武器天赋」职业特性。

选择弩或投石索。你在使用所选类型的任何武器进行的攻击骰上获得+1加值。你获得远程射击 Far Shot作为额外专长，即使你不符合前提条件。

Ranger Class.name: 游侠 Ranger
Ranger Class.description:
Role: 。你专注于远程攻击或双武器近战攻击，对单个敌人造成大量伤害。你的攻击基于速度和机动性，因为你总是尽可能的使用游击战术。

Power Source: 。你的才能来自于大量的训练和实践，内在的信心，以及天赋的娴熟。

Key Abilities: 力量，敏捷，感知

Armor Proficiencies: 布甲，皮甲，革甲

Weapon Proficiencies: 简易近战，军用近战，简易远程，军用远程

Bonus to Defense: +1强韧，+1反射

Hit Points at 1st Level: 12 + 体质值

Hit Points per Level Gained: 5

Healing Surges per Day: 6 + 体质调整值

Trained Skills: 地城或自然（由你选择）。1级时，从下列职业技能列表中，再选择4个受训技能。

Class Skills: 杂技(Dex)，运动(Str)，地城(Wis)，坚韧(Con)，医疗(Wis)，自然(Wis)，侦查(Wis)，隐秘(Dex)

 

「我从后面对付他。那个大地精会后悔朝我举起弓箭的。」

游侠是警惕的斗士，为了守护某块地区、某个信念或某种生活方式而四处漫游。游侠是弓与剑的大师，擅长游击突袭，能够快速而且安静的解决对手。游侠会设下完美的伏击并长于躲避危险。

作为一个游侠，你拥有近乎超自然的敏锐感官和对蛮荒地带的深刻认识。运用关于自然的知识，你能在几乎任何地形上追踪敌人，利用最不起眼的线索找到应走的路径，有时甚至仅仅是靠鸟兽的叫声。你毫不留情的作风对被你盯上的敌人来说就像已经被判了死刑。

当你发现猎物的时候，给予罪人死之惩罚的是从远处飞来的箭雨，还是你手中闪亮的双刀？

游侠简介

角色特性: 你结合了快速、强力的近战攻击威能和绝佳的远程攻击能力，可以在近战和远程之间灵活的切换。你在战斗中耐力一般，但是你偏好游击战术或者从远处伏击。痛击然后撤退——这就是游侠的做法。

信仰: 游侠偏好自然和狩猎的神祇。他们通常崇拜寇德，梅洛拉或者鸦后。邪恶或混乱邪恶的游侠通常信奉格乌什或者泽希尔。

种族: 精灵是理想的弓箭游侠。人类、半身人、龙裔和雅灵有时会投身于双刀游侠之路。

 

游侠职业特性

你的职业特性很大程度上基于你选择的人物构筑和战斗流派。

战斗流派 Fighting Style

从下列战斗流派中选一个，并获得相应的好处。

弓箭战斗流派 Archer Fighting Style: 由于专攻远程攻击，你获得防御移动 Defensive Mobility作为额外专长。

双刀战斗流派 Two-Blade Fighting Style: 由于专攻双武器近战，你可以在副手持用一件单手武器，就像它是一件副手武器一般。（记得在你的角色卡上注明哪件是主手哪件是副手）此外，你获得健壮 Toughness作为额外专长。

猎人战斗流派 Hunter Fighting Style（MP2）: 你获得即时备战 Quick Draw作为额外专长，即使你不满足其前提要求。另外，你可以以一个自由动作收起武器。你进行对抗由你远程攻击所引发的借机攻击的AC上获得+4加值。

掠夺者战斗流派 Marauder Fighting Style（MP2）: 你获得双武器防御 Two-Weapon Defense作为额外专长，即使你不满足其前提要求。另外，当你并没有使用盾牌或双手武器时，你在速度上获得+1加值

猎手标的 Hunter's Quarry

每回合一次，以一个次要动作，你可以指定一个离你最近的你可见的敌人为你的标的。

每轮一次，当你的攻击命中标的时，这次攻击造成基于你等级的额外伤害。如果你在一轮中能进行多次攻击，则你在所有攻击都掷骰完毕之后再决定哪次攻击附加此额外伤害。如果在你的回合开始后你已经造成过猎手标的的额外伤害，则你在你下回合开始之前不能再次造成此伤害。

猎手标的的效果持续直到遭遇结束，直到标的被击败，或直到你选择了一个新的目标作为你的标的。

你一次只能指定一个敌人作为你的标的。

准确射击 Prime Shot

如果没有任何盟友比你更靠近你的目标，则你在对此目标作出的远程攻击骰上获得+1加值。

游斗 Running Attack（MP2）

此职业特性会替代「准确射击」职业特性

如果你使用一个让你移动的标准动作，例如冲锋或包括移动的攻击威能，且该移动结束后离起点最少2格，那么你在这标准动作的攻击骰上获得+1加值。

兽王 Beast Mastery（MP1）

任何一个想要获得一头忠实野兽伙伴的游侠都能选择兽王职业特性。要选择此职业特性，你必须放弃「准确射击」职业特性，也不能选择任何「战斗流派」。

你获得一头野兽伙伴，从以下这些类型中选择：熊，野猪，猫，蜥蜴，猛禽，蛇，蜘蛛或狼。这些类型并不描述具体的动物，只是在D&D中相似类型生物的集群。由你决定动物的相关细节——种类，生理细节以及其他——确保他们对于他们的种类和战役来说是合适的。

例如，你的人物来自于沼泽地带，那你的蜥蜴伙伴就可以是一条鳄鱼。而从另一个地区来的蜥蜴伙伴就可以是一头巨蜥或者鬣蜥。野兽伙伴的种类并不影响它的游戏数据，那是由它的类型和等级来决定的。

你和你的野兽伙伴合作的如此之好，它仿佛就是你身体的延伸。在战斗中你能够用动作命令你的野兽伙伴行动（见下文“指挥野兽伙伴”）。

兽王也改变了你的「猎手标的」职业特性。当你使用「猎手标的」时，你可以指定你可见的距离你最近的或者距离你的野兽伙伴最近的敌人为你的标的。你或你的野兽伙伴都能造成猎手标的的额外伤害，不过在一轮内只有你们中的一个能造成额外伤害。

你的野兽伙伴被视为生物和盟友，也能被威能影响。牧师能够使用@UUID[Compendium.dnd-4e-compendium.module-powers.5wfZztM0RjQlVLiY]{治愈真言 Healing Word}治疗它，督军能够用@UUID[Compendium.dnd-4e-compendium.module-powers.w6dKpt7ImajLHesG]{号令打击 Commander's Strike}给予它近战基本攻击，等等。你和你的野兽伙伴视作不同的生物。

你一次只能拥有一头野兽伙伴。你可以随时驱散你的野兽伙伴不过获得新的并不是那么容易（见下文“获得新的伙伴”）。在游侠和野兽伙伴间的关系并不是主人和仆人间的，而是两个关系密切的朋友。

你所接受的训练使你能够和野兽构建一种密切的关系，你学会了「复活野兽伙伴」仪式，使你能够将你的野兽伙伴死而复生，即使你无法掌握并施展仪式

野兽伙伴数据 Beast Companion Statistics

野兽伙伴的类型决定了它大多数游戏数据，尽管所有的野兽同伴都有些共同的特性。

等级: 你的野兽伙伴的等级总是和你的相同。野兽的防御，生命值和攻击加值随着等级而增长。

属性值: 你野兽伙伴的类型决定了它的属性。在4级，8级，14级，24级和28级时，在你的野兽伙伴的两项属性上增加1。在11和21级时，你的野兽伙伴的所有属性都增加1。

回复力: 你的野兽伙伴有2次回复力。野兽的回复力值等于它最大生命值的四分之一。

视觉: 你的野兽伙伴有昏暗视觉。

野兽类型 Beast Categories

从以下类型中为你的野兽伙伴选择一种。一旦你选择了一种类型，例如狼，你就可以描述野兽的外表，如灰狼，獒犬或鬣狗。

复活野兽伙伴 Raise Beast Companion

你唤醒你的野兽伙伴。即使死亡分离了你们，你这之间的信任和友谊也能跨越任何状态。

|等级：|1|材料花费：|50gp| |类别：|复原|市场价格：|无| |时间：|4小时|关键技能：|自然（无检定）| |持续时间：|立即||| 这一仪式使你能够复活死去的野兽伙伴。只有拥有兽王职业特性的游侠才能使用此仪式。

此仪式与死者复活 Raise Dead仪式相似，除了以下例外：

* 你不需要野兽伙伴的部分尸体。 * 死亡惩罚持续到你达到三次里程碑。 * 典范等级的野兽伙伴需要花费500gp，传奇等级的野兽伙伴需要花费5,000gp。

指挥野兽伙伴 Commanding a Beast Companion

在战斗中你的野兽伙伴通常不会独立行动。使用下文提供的选项在你的回合内指挥野兽伙伴行动。你必须使用特定的动作命令野兽伙伴行动，并且你的伙伴必须能看见或者听见你。如果你不命令你的野兽伙伴它就会始终待在原地，只要你依旧清醒并且依旧在遭遇中。如果你失去意识或者不在遭遇中，则你的野兽伙伴能自主行动（见下文“野兽伙伴自主行动”）。

攻击（标准动作）: 你的野兽伙伴对一个你指定的目标进行一次近战基本攻击。

防御（标准动作）: 你的野兽伙伴或者你们两个都进入完全防御状态。如果你们在对方身边，则防御加值由+2变为+3。

移动（移动动作）: 你的野兽伙伴或者你们两个都进行移动动作。你们的动作不需要相同。

借机攻击（即时中断）: 如果某生物提供给你的野兽伙伴借机攻击的机会，你使用即时中断命令你的野兽进行攻击。

其他动作: 你使用需要的动作而你的野兽伙伴完成它。例如，捡起一个物体需要一个次要动作，所以你可以用一个次要动作要求你的动物伙伴用嘴叼起一袋钱币。

如果你的野兽伙伴不能完成动作。那你的动作就被浪费了，而它不做任何事。你的野兽伙伴不能使用你的威能，而你的DM有权最终决它能否完成某个动作。

野兽伙伴自主行动 Beast Companion Independent Actions

当你无法命令野兽伙伴时它可以自主行动。比如你失去意识或者死亡了或者你并不在遭遇中，你的野兽伙伴并不会仅仅是坐着不动，除非这是你希望它做的。

自主行动的野兽伙伴像其他人物一样，在每个它的回合内能进行一次标准动作，一次移动动作和一次次要动作，你能选择你的野兽伙伴的行动，只有一个限制：如果你的人物在遭遇中但不能命令你的野兽伙伴，则它每轮必须选择最安全的路线尽可能向你移动。一旦它在你身边它就能按照你所希望的行动了。

野兽伙伴和治疗 Beast Companions and Healing

你的野兽伙伴能和其他角色一样使用回复力，并且它也能受其他治疗能力的治疗，如牧师的@UUID[Compendium.dnd-4e-compendium.module-powers.5wfZztM0RjQlVLiY]{治愈真言 Healing Word}。

回气: 当你使用回气时，你的野兽伙伴也能使用一次回气。

其他治疗: 当你的野兽伙伴邻近你时，你能用一个次要动作花费一个你的回复力来治疗你的野兽伙伴，就仿佛它自己使用回复力一样。

死亡和濒死: 你的野兽伙伴在死亡和濒死时遵循和其他角色同样的规则。如果你的野兽伙伴死了你能用「复活野兽伙伴」仪式复活它。

获得新的伙伴 Gaining a New Companion

如果你想要更换一个新的野兽伙伴，则你可以使用玩家手册中的重训规则并在你升级时选择不同的野兽伙伴。你重训时可以重新选择野兽伙伴而不是重新选择一个专长，威能或者技能。

你保有现在的野兽伙伴直到你有机会在一个新的野兽伙伴生存的环境花几个小时找寻新野兽伙伴。如果你的野兽伙伴死了而你准备换一个新的，那你就不必复活它，只需要依照同样的规则。

DM可以选择运作一个包括你找到你的新伙伴的小冒险，也许是你营救它或者你们一起战胜某个对手。或者DM可以让你选择自己创造如何找到新伙伴的故事。

 

游侠威能

Your powers are bold exploits derived from your relentless training in archery and swordplay. At higher levels, you have access to special stance powers.

Ranger (Scout) Class.name: 游侠 Ranger (Scout)
Ranger (Scout) Class.description:
Role: 。Rangers such as the scout mix a singular two-weapon combat style with a mastery of primal magic to overwhelm their foes.

Power Source:

Key Abilities: 敏捷，感知

Armor Proficiencies: 布甲，皮甲，革甲

Weapon Proficiencies: 简易近战，军用近战，简易远程，军用远程

Bonus to Defense: +1强韧，+1反射

Hit Points at 1st Level: 12 + 体质值

Hit Points per Level Gained: 5

Healing Surges per Day: 7 + 体质调整值

Trained Skills: 地城或自然。1级时，从下列职业技能列表中，再选择4个受训技能。

Class Skills: 杂技(Dex)，运动(Str)，地城(Wis)，坚韧(Con)，医疗(Wis)，自然(Wis)，侦查(Wis)，隐秘(Dex)

 

属于游侠 Ranger的一种

Scouts learn to wield two weapons at once, from the supple combination of longsword and short sword to the brutal double assault of battleaxe and handaxe. This tactic denies the defensive benefit of a shield, but allows a scout to strike hard and fast. At their best when outnumbered and surrounded, scouts count on speed and accuracy in combat to overwhelm their foes.

Scouts augment their combat prowess with primal magic, channeling the supernatural power of the natural world to their advantage. Primal power allows a scout to pass by foes unseen, to discourage pursuit, and to keep his or her companions alive in the wild under conditions that would slay lesser explorers outright.

 

 

1级：双武器流派 Two-Weapon Style

From the time you first took up the scout's two-weapon fighting style, you have learned to maximize the effectiveness of your favored weapons.

你选择获得1个下列特性

闪刃掌握 Flashing Blade Mastery

With a light blade in your off hand, you maintain the agility that lets you keep your foes off balance and susceptible to your attacks.

Benefit: 当你副手持用轻刃时，你在武器攻击骰上获得+1加值

旋斧掌握 Spinning Axe Mastery

The axe is a brutal weapon that you trust to deal consistent damage. Scouts who face off against the largest, toughest enemies often favor the axe fighting style.

Benefit: 当你副手持用斧时，你在武器伤害骰上获得+2加值

1级：双武器攻击 Dual Weapon Attack

You have learned the importance of traveling fast and light as you stand between your foes and the folk you are sworn to defend. Other warriors define their combat style with the largest and most powerful weapons, often at the expense of maneuverability. You have learned to fight with two weapons, maximizing your mobility as you cut through foes with unparalleled ease.

Benefit: 你获得@UUID[Compendium.dnd-4e-compendium.module-powers.ckSuZnQARw3tXWBF]{双武器攻击 Dual Weapon Attack}威能

1级：攻击娴熟 Attack Finesse

Your two-weapon fighting style marks you as a warrior who relies on speed and grace more than on brute strength. Others try to cut through their foes as if they were chopping wood, but you have a more refined approach to melee.

Benefit: 当你进行一次近战基本攻击时，你可以使用你的敏捷调整值代替力量调整值来计算攻击骰和伤害骰。

1级：强力打击 Power Strike

Power strike is a quintessential exploit for many warriors. This power is usable with a wide range of tactics and a variety of weapons. The exploit ensures that your weapon has a devastating effect on a foe.

Benefit: 你获得@UUID[Compendium.dnd-4e-compendium.module-powers.RceW5jNqBOybEKFQ]{强力打击 Power Strike}威能

1级：荒野面貌 Aspects of the Wild

The weapon training and tactics you have developed drew both from martial training and from the teachings of druids and other masters of primal magic. You have struck a careful balance between the two approaches, mastering a fighting style that employs two weapons but augmenting it with primal magic that draws on the hunting tiger, the stalking wolf, and the soaring eagle.

This combination grants you mastery of primal aspects, reflections of natural beasts that guide you in combat. Quite literally, you fight with the strength, speed, and ferocity of an animal. Yet you temper this primal ruthlessness with the cool approach of a veteran warrior, giving you the best parts of both the primal and civilized worlds.

Benefit: 你选择获得下列威能中的2个

狡狐面貌 Aspect of the Cunning Fox

A ranger trains to fight, but sometimes the best tactic is one that allows you to escape from a battle. Like a fox, you use speed and cunning to outwit your foes. They might attempt to hinder your movement, but you easily dodge their attacks. When you strike, you remain one step ahead of your foes, dancing in and out of the battle.

冲羊面貌 Aspect of the Charging Ram

The ram relies on brute force to overwhelm its enemies, favoring a deadly charge. You mimic its tactics, drawing on primal magic to deliver a brutal attack. With this aspect, you run rampant over the battlefield. Your enemies shrink away as you barrel forward, unwilling to attack you or stand between you and your target.

舞蛇面貌 Aspect of the Dancing Serpent

A serpent strikes like lightning and retreats like a ghost. It lands deadly attacks but never lingers near its enemy. You mimic these tactics with this aspect, pouncing upon an isolated enemy and not letting it bog you down in close quarters.

饿鲨面貌 Aspect of the Hungry Shark

The loremasters hold that a shark can smell blood from miles away. Whether or not that is true, this aspect turns you into a single-minded killer. When you smell blood, you attack mercilessly.

伏蛛面貌 Aspect of the Lurking Spider

Many other predators rely on strength and overwhelming force, but the spider is a patient slayer. Using a combination of stealth and maneuverability, it lures its foe into its lair and strikes to kill.

群狼面貌 Aspect of the Pack Wolf

A wolf pack is a whole that is stronger than the sum of its parts. When you enter this aspect, you develop an instinctual understanding of your allies' movements and attacks. When you make your own attack, you use your allies' presence to land a telling blow.

狮王面貌 Aspect of the Regal Lion

The lion is the king of the savannah, a proud hunter and a ferocious enemy. When you enter this aspect, you gain the lion's unmatched bravery and resolute determination. No foe, regardless of its size or strength, can hope to match your tenacity.

翔鹰面貌 Aspect of the Soaring Hawk

From its perch among the winds, high above the ground, a hawk keeps careful watch on the land. When it spots its prey, it strikes in the blink of an eye. This aspect allows you to channel the hawk's speed and also take advantage of the hawk's high perch. In battle, your spirit almost rises out of your body, allowing you to strike true regardless of the obstacles before you.

1级：荒野秘诀 Wilderness Knacks

All rangers learn to survive in the wilderness, whether that realm is a frozen tundra, a verdant forest, or a mushroom-choked cavern deep beneath the earth. You have acquired a couple of tricks and abilities that give you and your allies a key edge.

Benefit: 你选择获得下列能力中的2个

伏击专精 Ambush Expertise

You have wandered through dangerous realms, such as kingdoms ruled by hobgoblin tyrants and mountain ranges jealously guarded by brooding giants. You know not only how to hide yourself, but also how to hide others.

Benefit: 当你进行一次隐秘检定时，在你下回合结束前，离你10格内的每个盟友在他下一次隐秘检定上获得+2加值

野兽共鸣 Beast Empathy

The beasts of the wilderness see and know most of what unfolds in their realm. Few folk heed them, but you have learned to understand and interpret their actions and attitudes. Your woodcraft is short of the magical ability to communicate with animals directly, but it is enough to reveal secrets that others miss.

Benefit: 你在对野兽的唬骗、交涉和威吓检定上获得+2加值。你可以传达简单的概念和命令给这些生物，即使它们未被强迫来服从你。通过一次成功的洞察检定（DC由DM决定），你可以通过阅读一个生物的肢体语言和声音来理解其所想表达的基本信息。

山地向导 Mountain Guide

You have clambered over steep cliffs and ranged across imposing mountains. Your knack for climbing allows you to pick out the easiest paths up even the most imposing slopes.

Benefit: 当你在攀爬上的一次运动检定成功时，你的盟友进行该攀爬的DC减少2直到遭遇结束。只有看见你攀爬的盟友才能获得此增益。

警觉休息 Watchful Rest

Long days spent in the wilds have taught you the best way to set up a camp. By picking out an easily defensible spot and carefully positioning your gear, you ensure that you and your allies have the best chance to avoid an ambush.

Benefit: 当你进行一次长休息时，你和所有同时进行休息的盟友的侦查检定不会因睡眠而受到-5减值。

荒野追踪 Wilderness Tracker

You are an expert at reading the signs of a creature's passage. When you inspect an area, a splintered twig or a trampled leaf is enough for you to glean a significant amount of information. Even the slyest rogues and sneakiest warlocks leave behind some trace of their passage.

Benefit: 在一次短休息中，你可以进行一次侦查检定（DC由DM决定）来搜索你周围的区域。该区域的一边大小可以有10格。若你检定成功，则你得知在过去24小时内曾穿过这片区域的生物的数量和性质。你知道他们是在何时何地进入这片区域，也知道他们是在何时何地离开这片区域。

2级：辅助威能 Utility Power

As you gain experience, your knowledge of primal magic grows ever deeper. You now supplement your hard-earned woodcraft with the ability to command primal magic directly.

Benefit: 你获得1个2级或更低级的游侠辅助威能

3级：进阶强力打击 Improved Power Strike .ind

Ranger (Hunter) Class.name: 游侠 Ranger (Hunter)
Ranger (Hunter) Class.description:
Role: 。Rangers such as the hunter use their training and skill with ranged weapons as well as a reverence for the natural world to make them champions of the wilderness.

Power Source:

Key Abilities: 敏捷，感知

Armor Proficiencies: 布甲，皮甲

Weapon Proficiencies: 简易近战，军用近战，简易远程，军用远程

Bonus to Defense: +1强韧，+1反射

Hit Points at 1st Level: 12 + 体质值

Hit Points per Level Gained: 5

Healing Surges per Day: 6 + 体质调整值

Trained Skills: 地城或自然。1级时，从下列职业技能列表中，再选择4个受训技能。

Class Skills: 杂技(Dex)，运动(Str)，地城(Wis)，坚韧(Con)，医疗(Wis)，自然(Wis)，侦查(Wis)，隐秘(Dex)

 

属于游侠 Ranger的一种

Hunters are the masters of ranged weapons, and they draw on cunning battle tactics to deter their enemies. Reverent allies of the natural world, hunters train in the deep forests and wilderness, tracking down and slaying monsters intent on attacking villages and towns. At the same time, they seek to find harmony with the beneficial creatures of nature, and they learn to dabble in primal power—the magic of nature itself.

A hunter is a controller first and foremost, manipulating the battlefield using high-precision ranged attacks. Against single targets, however, a hunter's attacks pack a punch that make it lean toward striker as a secondary role.

 

 

1级：射艺流派 Archery Style

All hunters are archers, and your choice of ranged weapon defines an archery style that you will hone and perfect over the course of your adventuring career.

Many hunters—from the elves and eladrin of the wild forests to the humans and half-orcs of the plains and tundra—choose the longbow as their signature weapon. Most halflings prefer the shortbow due to its ease of use by smaller combatants, but either weapon excels at mowing down groups of marauding goblins, orcs, and other foul creatures.

The crossbow is often a more useful weapon in the cramped quarters of the Underdark. The dwarf hunters who took up their profession in the ancient caverns of their race's fallen strongholds favor the crossbow, as do hunters who spend their time in the gloom-tainted forest ruins spread across the borderlands.

你选择获得1个下列特性

弓之猎人 Bow Hunter

You have spent so many hours training with the bow that you have learned, on your own, to use the weapon as capably as someone who received special training.

Benefit: 你获得弓专精 Bow Expertise专长

弩之猎人 Crossbow Hunter

As an expert with the crossbow, you can reload bolts in the blink of an eye. You have also mastered the intricacies of this weapon, attaining a high level of skill through focused training and practice.

Benefit: 你获得弩专精 Crossbow Expertise专长

同时，若你持用的弩具有次要装填特性，则你可以改为以自由装填来使用

1级：专业射手 Expert Archer

In the hands of a hunter, a ranged weapon becomes the most fearsome tool on the battlefield. Each arrow or bolt you fire is part of a deadly assault that no foe can stand against for long. You learn a number of tricks and techniques with ranged weapons.

Benefit: 你获得下列3个威能

瞄准射击 Aimed Shot

Your focus and training allow you to draw a bead on your target despite cover, fog, and other impediments. Your mind clears, your foe comes into focus, and you unleash a shot.

机敏射击 Clever Shot

Your skill with ranged attacks comes across in a variety of ways. Aimed shot reflects your focus and accuracy, while rapid shot is the byproduct of your speed and skill in handling your weapon. Clever shot draws on your guile and insight. You aim your shot to strike your foe at just the right angle, hindering its movement or knocking it backward as you see fit.

快速射击 Rapid Shot

By sacrificing some amount of accuracy, you unleash a series of attacks against your enemies that encourage them to spread out. When your enemies linger close to each other, your speed and confidence with your weapon allow you to lay waste their formations.

1级：破坏射击 Disruptive Shot

As a battle rages around you, sometimes you spot the perfect moment to unleash a devastating shot. A foe might lose track of you for a moment, or you notice that a slight crack in an enemy's helm is the perfect spot for a shot that glances off its skull. Your skill with the bow allows you to take advantage of such opportunities.

Benefit: 你获得@UUID[Compendium.dnd-4e-compendium.module-powers.HS8qgTDy4bPtxcM9]{破坏射击 Disruptive Shot}威能

1级：武器才能 Weapon Talent

Your training with weapons grants you superior accuracy.

Benefit: 你在武器攻击的攻击骰上获得+1加值

1级：荒野面貌 Aspects of the Wild

You have spent uncounted days in the wild, seeking forgotten paths, hunting bandits and monsters that threaten the scattered points of civilization along the frontier, and ferreting out nascent threats before they grow to menace the land. Your hours of isolated wandering build on the lore of the master hunters who taught you what you know, granting you insight into the mysterious workings of primal magic. By channeling this power, you take on the grace and strength of great beasts of the wild as you hunt your foes.

Each aspect grants a particular benefit to your attacks, whether by helping you better control the battlefield through forcing your enemies to move, limiting a creature's combat options, or dealing damage to additional foes.

Benefit: 你选择获得下列威能中的2个

狡狐面貌 Aspect of the Cunning Fox

A ranger trains to fight, but sometimes the best tactic is one that allows you to escape from a battle. Like a fox, you use speed and cunning to outwit your foes. They might attempt to hinder your movement, but you easily dodge their attacks. When you strike, you remain one step ahead of your foes, dancing in and out of the battle.

舞蛇面貌 Aspect of the Dancing Serpent

A serpent strikes like lightning and retreats like a ghost. It lands deadly attacks but never lingers near its enemy. You mimic these tactics with this aspect, pouncing upon an isolated enemy and not letting it bog you down in close quarters.

猎猫面貌 Aspect of the Pouncing Lynx

Hunting cats, such as the lynx, rely on speed and surprise to overwhelm their prey in a burst of sudden action. Drawing on primal magic, you employ a similar tactic. When battle is joined, you seize the initiative and make a deadly attack. If your foes manage to leap upon you before you can act, you escape their grasp with a quick move.

独狼面貌 Aspect of the Lone Wolf

Many hunters learn from the lone wolf, a creature forced to forage on its own. Like a lone wolf, a hunter must sometimes venture into the wilds without the benefit of companions. During such journeys, he or she knows the value in finishing a wounded foe as quickly as possible, lest the enemy overwhelm the hunter with superior numbers.

伏蛛面貌 Aspect of the Lurking Spider

Many other predators rely on strength and overwhelming force, but the spider is a patient slayer. Using a combination of stealth and maneuverability, it lures its foe into its lair and strikes to kill.

群狼面貌 Aspect of the Pack Wolf

A wolf pack is a whole that is stronger than the sum of its parts. When you enter this aspect, you develop an instinctual understanding of your allies' movements and attacks. When you make your own attack, you use your allies' presence to land a telling blow.

狮王面貌 Aspect of the Regal Lion

The lion is the king of the savannah, a proud hunter and a ferocious enemy. When you enter this aspect, you gain the lion's unmatched bravery and resolute determination. No foe, regardless of its size or strength, can hope to match your tenacity.

猎鹰面貌 Aspect of the Seeking Falcon

The falcon is a hunter and a wanderer, allowing the primal spirits of wind to guide it along its path. You tap into this bond and become part of it, gaining both the falcon's keen eyesight and the benefits of its kinship with the spirits of the wind.

1级：荒野秘诀 Wilderness Knacks

All rangers learn to survive in the wilderness, whether that realm is a frozen tundra, a verdant forest, or a mushroom-choked cavern deep beneath the earth. You have acquired a couple of tricks and abilities that give you and your allies a key edge.

Benefit: 你选择获得下列能力中的2个

伏击专精 Ambush Expertise

You have wandered through dangerous realms, such as kingdoms ruled by hobgoblin tyrants and mountain ranges jealously guarded by brooding giants. You know not only how to hide yourself, but also how to hide others.

Benefit: 当你进行一次隐秘检定时，在你下回合结束前，离你10格内的每个盟友在他下一次隐秘检定上获得+2加值

野兽共鸣 Beast Empathy

The beasts of the wilderness see and know most of what unfolds in their realm. Few folk heed them, but you have learned to understand and interpret their actions and attitudes. Your woodcraft is short of the ma

Battlemind Class.name: 战魂 Battlemind
Battlemind Class.description:
Role: 。你强壮且迅速，你对灵能魔法的掌握让你击败敌人。根据你所选择的职业特性和威能，你的第二职位倾向于控制者或打击者。

Power Source: 。你是灵能的战士，是把身体力量和狡黠的智力联合的武器大师。

Key Abilities: 体质，感知，魅力

Armor Proficiencies: 布甲，皮甲，革甲，链甲，鳞甲；轻盾，重盾

Weapon Proficiencies: 简易近战，军用近战，简易远程

Bonus to Defense: +2意志

Hit Points at 1st Level: 15 + 体质值

Hit Points per Level Gained: 6

Healing Surges per Day: 9 + 体质调整值

Trained Skills: 1级时，从下列职业技能列表中，选择3个受训技能。

Class Skills: 神秘(Int)，运动(Str)，唬骗(Cha)，交涉(Cha)，坚韧(Con)，医疗(Wis)，洞察(Wis)，威吓(Cha)

 

「我的精神是远比钢铁更致命的武器。」

As wanderers, mercenaries, and adventurers, battleminds are carefree warriors who seek only to test their skill against the mightiest and most dangerous opponents. Battleminds possess a potent combination of psionic and physical skill, allowing them to use their magic to manipulate and deceive their foes even as their fighting skill lets them carve a swath through enemy ranks. Battleminds tend to be bold and sometimes arrogant, an attitude earned through bringing ruin to enemies over the course of many conflicts.

You might not share your fellow battleminds' arrogance, but you do have access to an array of combat abilities that let you manipulate, baffle, and defeat your enemies. Your mind is as deadly as your weapon, and with the aid of your psionic magic, your body can turn aside attacks as effectively as a suit of plate armor can.

Let those who would stand against your might quiver in terror when you approach, for you are a battlemind, and supremacy in combat is your birthright.

战魂简介

角色特性: 你的重甲让你不惧怕承受敌人的攻击，而你使用灵能魔法强化的近战攻击可以让你像木偶一样控制敌人并将其击败。你擅长控制战斗进程，以及强迫敌人在你队友肆虐的同时与你战斗。

信仰: Battleminds who live up to this class's renowned arrogance rarely pray to the gods, and stories abound of battleminds whose ill luck could be placed at the feet of their impiety. Those battleminds who do follow the gods typically revere Kord for his martial skill and strength, Bahamut for his practice of justice, or Ioun for being the originator of psionic magic.

种族: Dwarves and wilden make excellent resilient battleminds, putting their Constitution and Wisdom to great use in shaping their bodies to meet the needs of combat. Half-elves are ideal quick battleminds, channeling their natural Charisma into psionic alacrity. Goliaths' sheer physical power makes them well suited for this class, and many gnome and tiefling warriors are drawn to the guile and trickery of some battlemind powers.

 

战魂职业特性

战魂具有下列职业特性。

灵能强化 Psionic Augmentation

通过训练和谨慎的研究，你已经掌握了比其他角色掌控的威能更具灵活性的一种灵能魔法。你了解一大堆随意威能，你可以随意注入不等量的灵能之力来引导威能。你将灵能之力导入个人的灵能池中——在游戏中以灵能点表示——凭借于此，你可以用于强化你的随意攻击威能，以此代替其他角色使用的遭遇威能。

由于这种特殊的职业特性，你获得和使用威能的方式与其他大多数职业的方式有微小的区别。

随意攻击威能： 1级时，你从你的职业选择两个随意攻击威能和一个每日攻击威能，但你没有从这个职业获得任何遭遇攻击威能。相对的，你可以使用灵能点来强化你的职业随意攻击威能。这些威能都有可强化关键字。

当你升级时，你从职业中获得新的随意攻击威能而不是新的遭遇攻击威能。3级时，你从这个职业中选择一个新的随意攻击威能。在7，13，17，23和27级时，你可以用一个与你同等级或更低级的随意攻击威能来替换你当前的一个随意攻击威能。这些威能必须都是可强化威能，而且属于这个职业。

灵能点: 在起始时，你有2个灵能点。在3，7，17，21，23，27级时，你获得额外2个灵能点。在13级时，你获得额外1个灵能点。如果你从其他来源获得灵能点（例如你的典范之道），则将它们加到你的灵能点总数上。你可以用你的灵能点来强化你拥有的任何可强化威能，无论你是怎么获得这个威能的。

在一个短休息或长休息后，你恢复所有的灵能点。

灵能防御 Psionic Defense

三个威能——@UUID[Compendium.dnd-4e-compendium.module-powers.RzDioXCbyfN128Wx]{战魂斥责 Battlemind's Demand}，@UUID[Compendium.dnd-4e-compendium.module-powers.UzEB1Qo8KSGvRW3d]{模糊脚步 Blurred Step}和@UUID[Compendium.dnd-4e-compendium.module-powers.I9Rkf2BUKbvchLXN]{精神之矛 Mind Spike}——帮助你保持战斗中的战术优势。你可以使用这些灵能威能吸引敌人的注意力，当他们试图避开你时追踪敌人，并在他们攻击你的盟友时惩戒他们。你的这些联结了精神冲动和灵能增强的能力让你成为战场上无法忽视的目标。

灵能学识 Psionic Study

Battleminds learn to fight using their bodies as weapons. Some battleminds alter their own form to fit their needs. Other battleminds use their psionic power to predict the best position for launching an attack.

在以下选项中选择1个。

战斗适应 Battle Resilience: 你获得@UUID[Compendium.dnd-4e-compendium.module-powers.eUlwcFTSMoYk0O9n]{战斗适应 Battle Resilience}威能，这反映了你使用灵能能量改变你的身体用以保护自己的能力。

思维速度 Speed of Thought: 你获得@UUID[Compendium.dnd-4e-compendium.module-powers.Z5uXc9QhneDJVSso]{思维速度 Speed of Thought}威能，这使得你可以在任何时候都可以投入战斗。

坚定猎杀 Persistent Harrier（PsP）: 你获得@UUID[Compendium.dnd-4e-compendium.module-powers.7ndBoDVkcpxZfNH2]{坚定猎杀 Persistent Harrier}威能，这使你能轻松以智计猎杀对手。

野性聚焦 Wild Focus（DSCS）: 你获得@UUID[Compendium.dnd-4e-compendium.module-powers.Mu0r4qksRlXCD2Ze]{野性聚焦 Wild Focus}威能，它可以显示出你战斗中最原始的精神力量。

 

战魂威能

你的威能被称为灵律；它们将你的战斗能力和对灵能魔法的掌握融为一体。你可以在一个敌人的思想中投下幻象，使用灵能威能使你的攻击获得无可匹敌的速度和力量。

Fighter (Knight) Class.name: 战士 Fighter (Knight)
Fighter (Knight) Class.description:
Role: 。Fighters such as the knight use tactical cunning to lock down and control enemies, letting their heavy armor and abundant hit points protect them from the worst attacks.

Power Source:

Key Abilities: 力量，体质

Armor Proficiencies: 布甲，皮甲，革甲，链甲，鳞甲，板甲；轻盾，重盾

Weapon Proficiencies: 简易近战，军用近战，简易远程，军用远程

Bonus to Defense: +2强韧

Hit Points at 1st Level: 15 + 体质值

Hit Points per Level Gained: 6

Healing Surges per Day: 9 + 体质调整值

Trained Skills: 1级时，从下列职业技能列表中，选择3个受训技能。

Class Skills: 运动(Str)，交涉(Cha)，坚韧(Con)，医疗(Wis)，威吓(Cha)

 

属于战士的一种

Along the borderlands, knights are the stalwart commanders of peasant militias, caravan guards, and adventuring groups. Their cunning and skill puts them in control of the battlefield and lets them minimize the onslaught of their enemies. Rampaging monsters fear a knight above almost any other attacker. While the knight locks down a formidable foe, the other members of a party close in for the kill.

Many knights are members of chivalrous orders, though some are independent warriors who wander wherever their hearts take them. Each order combines a rigid sense of honor and relentless training to produce champions of the borderlands. Whenever ogres descend from the hills, when hobgoblins march from their strongholds, and when necromancers call forth armies of undead, a noble knight is the best defense an isolated community can hope for.

All sorts of warriors follow the path of the knight: young wanderers seeking to prove their mettle and gain full membership into a knightly order, reclusive warriors who abandon material comforts in favor of crusades for justice, or self-centered mercenaries who hope to claim treasure and power after every fight.

Most knights start as squires, training with orders that have heroic and historic names such as the Knights of the Watch or the Order of the Silver Dragon. Through study, martial practice, and adventuring, a squire earns the right to wear armor and bear the weapons of a knight. Orders maintain small keeps on the borderlands, from which they send out patrols, enforce the law, and repel monstrous incursions.

 

 

1级：防御者灵气 Defender Aura

You are a knight, and the battlefield is your home. Amid the chaos and violence, you keep a cool head as you carefully measure your foes, counting on your presence and the threat of your weapon to keep their focus on you.

Benefit: 你获得@UUID[Compendium.dnd-4e-compendium.module-powers.qPpXEzFWDVgUOxJa]{防御者灵气 Defender Aura}威能

1级：战斗守卫者 Battle Guardian

As a fighter, you must keep track of a multitude of foes and allies in the heat of battle. When an enemy turns its attention from you to concentrate on one of your allies, you punish it with a brutal attack. The power below affects creatures under the effect of your defender aura power.

Benefit: 你获得@UUID[Compendium.dnd-4e-compendium.module-powers.wsS5VmnvPhYktLM4]{战斗守卫者 Battle Guardian}威能

1级：精野守卫者 Feywild Guardian（Dragon #395）

Eladrin possess basic magical talent. Eladrin knights who exploit this ability can stay one step ahead of their enemies. This power lets you vanish from one position and appear elsewhere so that you can strike an enemy more effectively.

Benefit: 你可以选择@UUID[Compendium.dnd-4e-compendium.module-powers.4eK2BwiIrYJSAH6x]{精野守卫者 Feywild Guardian}威能来替换@UUID[Compendium.dnd-4e-compendium.module-powers.wsS5VmnvPhYktLM4]{战斗守卫者 Battle Guardian}

1级：武器才能 Weapon Talent

As a fighter, you have insight into all types of weapons and the ability to use them to deadly effect.

Benefit: 你在武器攻击的攻击骰上获得+1加值

1级：盾牌娴熟 Shield Finesse

Your singular training has made your shield into an extension of your arm, its weight not even slowing you down.

Benefit: 你获得盾牌娴熟 Shield Finesse专长

1级：旋木偏移 Spinning Deflection（Dragon #391）

You can spin a quarterstaff around your body so quickly that you can turn aside attacks with it just as well as you could with a shield.

Benefit: 你可选择此特性来替换「盾牌娴熟」特性

当你持用木棍时，你被视为持用了盾牌，可满足以此为前提的威能和效果。你同时在AC和反射上获得+1盾牌加值

1级：战士架势 Fighter Stances

Fighters learn a number of stances, special powers that combine positioning, footwork, and combat tactics to maximum effect. A stance allows you to customize your approach for fighting different enemies. Against a massive ogre, battle wrath allows a knight to overcome that creature's impressive hit points more quickly. Against monsters that gain advantage from flanking you, measured cut lets you stay in motion to keep them out of position.

Benefit: 你选择获得下列威能中的2个

战斗狂怒 Battle Wrath

Tactics and cunning have their place in every battle. However, you learned early in your training that raw anger is an effective weapon against a foe that refuses to die.

顺劈进攻 Cleaving Assault

The knights who protect the borderlands stand against hordes of goblins, kobolds, and other creatures that rely on sheer numbers to overcome their victims. After countless battles fighting against overwhelming odds, you have perfected a whirling assault technique that uses the follow-through from an attack for deadly effect.

坚守防线 Defend the Line

When numerous foes threaten to overwhelm your allies, you focus on keeping those enemies close. By vowing to hold the line, you ensure that your attacks leave your foes struggling to move into optimal position before you strike again.

战锤之手 Hammer Hands

The first time an enemy slipped past you to strike one of your allies, you learned that combat mastery is about more than the strength of your arm. As long as an enemy is a threat to your allies, you rely on the hammer hands stance to keep that foe exactly where you want it.

谨慎切割 Measured Cut

Your ability to stay in motion can turn the tide of battle against foes that depend on gaining superior positions. You have trained hard to let the force of your attacks carry you past your enemies, shifting boldly through combat with each successive strike.

沉着进攻 Poised Assault

The more often you hit, the more your foe hurts. You learned this basic truth of combat with your earliest weapon training, and have since honed and refined it. Spotting the weaknesses in any foe's defenses, you take advantage of those weaknesses as no one else can.

微光之刃 Glimmering Blade（Dragon #395）

During the War of the Pelt, eladrin knights defeated their lycanthrope enemies with frustrating hit-andrun tactics. Glimmering blade lets you use these same tactics to keep your enemies guessing where you will strike next.

1级：强力打击 Power Strike

Power strike is a quintessential exploit. This power is usable with a wide range of tactics and a variety of weapons. The exploit ensures that your weapon has a devastating effect on your foe.

Benefit: 你获得@UUID[Compendium.dnd-4e-compendium.module-powers.RceW5jNqBOybEKFQ]{强力打击 Power Strike}威能

2级：辅助威能 Utility Power

Although your focus is the battlefield, you learn to make use of your skill training in combat through utility exploits. Each of these powers requires you to have training in a particular class skill before you can select and use the power.

When evaluating these powers, consider not just a power's benefit, but the backstory you created when choosing your trained skills. For example, if you chose Diplomacy as a trained skill to reflect the time your knight spent teaching local villagers how to defend themselves, taking battle leader shows how that experience has enhanced your combat tactics.

Benefit: 你获得1个2级或更低级的战士辅助威能

3级：进阶强力打击 Improved Power Strike

Every battle teaches you something about your own combat potential that you did not know before. As you increase in level, power strike becomes an even more effective tool for you.

Benefit: 你每场遭遇可多使用一次@UUID[Compendium.dnd-4e-compendium.module-powers.RceW5jNqBOybEKFQ]{强力打击 Power Strike}威能，但你仍然每回合只能使用一次

4级：属性值增加 Ability Score Increase

Your constant training hones your body and mind.

Benefit: 你选择的两个属性值都增加1点

4级：战斗准备 Combat Readiness

You have honed your intuition and awareness for battle, allowing you to better predict when combat will break out.

Benefit: 你在先攻上获得+2加值

5级：武器精通 Weapon Mastery

Let the spellcasters boast of the fire and lightning they rain down on the battlefield. You know that the reliability of your weapons will win the day.

Benefit: 你在武器攻击的伤害骰上获得+1加值

6级：辅助威能 Utility Power

Your skill training once more helps to expand your abilities in combat.

Benefit: 你获得1个6级或更低级的战士辅助威能

7级：额外战士架势 Extra Fighter Stance

Your mastery of the fighting arts is honed by each new challenge you face. You learn a new fighting style to build on the methods you have already perfected.

Benefit: 你从1级战士架势的选项中额外获得一个战士架势

7级：武器专精 Weapon Specialization

Your singular skill with your chosen weapon lends itself to even deadlier combat tactics.

Benefit: 你选择获得下列收益的1种

剑刃步法 Bladed Step

You have learned to fight on two sides at once, so your enemies never know where your next attack might come from.

Benefit: 在你以一把重刃使用@UUID[Compendium.dnd-4e-compendium.module-powers.RceW5jNqBOybEKFQ]{强力打击 Power Strike}之后，你可以立即快步1格到邻近一个敌人的格子。然后你对那个敌人获得战斗优势直到你下回合结束

Fighter (Slayer) Class.name: 战士 Fighter (Slayer)
Fighter (Slayer) Class.description:
Role: 。Fighters such as the slayer use overwhelming force to take down enemies. The slayer's use of heavy armor and a large amount of hit points allow the slayer to stand in for a defender when the tide of battle requires it.

Power Source:

Key Abilities: 力量，敏捷

Armor Proficiencies: 布甲，皮甲，革甲，链甲，鳞甲

Weapon Proficiencies: 简易近战，军用近战，简易远程，军用远程

Bonus to Defense: +2强韧

Hit Points at 1st Level: 15 + 体质值

Hit Points per Level Gained: 6

Healing Surges per Day: 9 + 体质调整值

Trained Skills: 1级时，从下列职业技能列表中，选择3个受训技能。

Class Skills: 运动(Str)，坚韧(Con)，医疗(Wis)，威吓(Cha)，市井(Cha)

 

属于战士的一种

When tales are told of the most legendary warriors, slayers are the heroes those stories speak of. Slayers are elite shock troops, standing at the forefront of battle with a combination of strong armor, advanced tactical cunning, and a mastery of withering two-handed weapon attacks.

On the borderlands of civilization, the common folk are beset on all sides by a multitude of foes. Goblin invaders can outnumber a town's defenders five to one, and powerful giants and trolls can easily shrug off a spear thrust or a crossbow bolt. The slayer is trained to correct this imbalance. By pairing the heaviest melee weapons with fearless combat tactics, a slayer can score deadly blows against larger enemies or hew through mobs of lesser foes.

Slayers come from all backgrounds and societies. Some are warriors with only the most basic training, relying on raw fury and instinct to overwhelm their enemies. Others might be former soldiers whose homes have been destroyed like so many others on the borderlands, and who have sworn to use their martial skills for vengeance.

The slayer combines the best traits of a defender and a striker, with superior defenses backed by devastating weapon attacks. This class grants heavy armor proficiency and plenty of hit points, making a slayer the ideal warrior to stand at the front line of battle.

 

 

1级：英勇杀手 Heroic Slayer

Although other warriors might focus on defense or fancy maneuvers, you have trained from your first day of combat to cut your foes down without mercy.

Benefit: 你在武器攻击的伤害骰上获得等同于你敏捷调整值的加值

1级：武器才能 Weapon Talent

As a fighter, you have insight into all types of weapons and the ability to use them to deadly effect.

Benefit: 你在武器攻击的攻击骰上获得+1加值

1级：战士架势 Fighter Stances

Fighters learn a number of stances, special powers that combine positioning, footwork, and combat tactics to maximum effect. A stance allows you to customize your approach for fighting different enemies. Against a massive ogre, battle wrath allows a knight to overcome that creature's impressive hit points more quickly. Against monsters that gain advantage from flanking you, measured cut lets you stay in motion to keep them out of position.

Benefit: 你选择获得下列威能中的2个

战斗狂怒 Battle Wrath

Tactics and cunning have their place in every battle. However, you learned early in your training that raw anger is an effective weapon against a foe that refuses to die.

野蛮冲锋 Berserker's Charge

Subtle shifting and skirmish tactics work for some, but you prefer to make your movement in combat count. You have trained to unleash the full fury of your combat style in devastating charge attacks that let you lay waste to your foes.

决斗进攻 Duelist's Assault

You have undertaken a focus on single combat that makes you seek out lone foes at the edge of the battlefi eld. With no other opponents to divide your attention and no allies to distract you, nothing stands between you and your enemy’s destruction.

迅捷剑刃 Mobile Blade

You have learned to let the momentum of each attack carry you into position for your next strike. Your willingness to fi ght foe to foe lets you make your way through a crowd to reach your real target, and is especially effective against minion defenders that cannot stand against your assault.

沉着进攻 Poised Assault

The more often you hit, the more your foe hurts. You learned this basic truth of combat with your earliest weapon training, and have since honed and refined it. Spotting the weaknesses in any foe's defenses, you take advantage of those weaknesses as no one else can.

狂怒解放 Unfettered Fury

Other warriors try to control their rage out of the fear that it will compromise their careful training. You prefer to embrace your berserker fury, gladly sacrifi cing accuracy in combat to take out lightly armored foes with crippling attacks.

1级：强力打击 Power Strike

Power strike is a quintessential exploit. This power is usable with a wide range of tactics and a variety of weapons. The exploit ensures that your weapon has a devastating effect on your foe.

Benefit: 你获得@UUID[Compendium.dnd-4e-compendium.module-powers.RceW5jNqBOybEKFQ]{强力打击 Power Strike}威能

2级：辅助威能 Utility Power

Although your focus is the battlefield, you learn to make use of your skill training in combat through utility exploits. Each of these powers requires you to have training in a particular class skill before you can select and use the power.

When evaluating these powers, consider not just a power's benefit, but the backstory you created when choosing your trained skills. For example, if you chose Diplomacy as a trained skill to reflect the time your knight spent teaching local villagers how to defend themselves, taking battle leader shows how that experience has enhanced your combat tactics.

Benefit: 你获得1个2级或更低级的战士辅助威能

3级：进阶强力打击 Improved Power Strike

Every battle teaches you something about your own combat potential that you did not know before. As you increase in level, power strike becomes an even more effective tool for you.

Benefit: 你每场遭遇可多使用一次@UUID[Compendium.dnd-4e-compendium.module-powers.RceW5jNqBOybEKFQ]{强力打击 Power Strike}威能，但你仍然每回合只能使用一次

4级：属性值增加 Ability Score Increase

Your constant training hones your body and mind.

Benefit: 你选择的两个属性值都增加1点

4级：快速易武 Quick Swap

Your weapons are extensions of your body. When changing your focus from nearby foes to distant enemies, you can switch between your melee and ranged weapons with ease.

Benefit: 每个你的回合一次，你能以一个自由动作取代次要动作来抽出或收起一件武器

5级：强力杀手 Mighty Slayer

Your single-minded dedication to offense makes you an increasingly deadly presence in combat.

Benefit: 由你的「英勇杀手」职业特性提供的武器伤害骰加值增加到2 + 你敏捷调整值

6级：辅助威能 Utility Power

Your skill training once more helps to expand your abilities in combat.

Benefit: 你获得1个6级或更低级的战士辅助威能

7级：额外战士架势 Extra Fighter Stance

Your mastery of the fighting arts is honed by each new challenge you face. You learn a new fighting style to build on the methods you have already perfected.

Benefit: 你从1级战士架势的选项中额外获得一个战士架势

7级：武器专精 Weapon Specialization

As the unquestioned master of two-handed weapon combat, you have learned to imbue your attacks with even more destructive power.

Benefit: 你选择获得下列收益的1种

凶残之斧 Brutal Axe

Few foes are tenacious enough to face you in combat. Against them, you have developed a suitable maneuver—a brutal axe strike that knocks a creature to the ground and leaves it at your mercy.

Benefit: 当你以一把双手斧使用@UUID[Compendium.dnd-4e-compendium.module-powers.RceW5jNqBOybEKFQ]{强力打击 Power Strike}时，你可将目标击倒。

扫荡之剑 Sweeping Sword

As a dominant melee combatant, you are a natural target for attacks by packs of lesser foes. To fight them, you have mastered a sweeping attack that lets you shrug off a number of enemies at one time.

Benefit: 当你以一把双手重刃使用@UUID[Compendium.dnd-4e-compendium.module-powers.RceW5jNqBOybEKFQ]{强力打击 Power Strike}时，你可滑动邻近你的每个敌人1格

迅捷之杖 Rapid Quarterstaff（Dragon #391）

When you strike a solid blow upon your enemy, you can convert the force of the impact to let you whip the staff around you at incredible speeds. You hammer at the foes around you with a broad, sweeping blow.

Benefit: 当你以一把杖使用@UUID[Compendium.dnd-4e-compendium.module-powers.RceW5jNqBOybEKFQ]{强力打击 Power Strike}时，除了威能目标外所有邻近你的敌人受到等同于你敏捷调整值的伤害

8级：属性值增加 Ability Score Increase

You reap the reward of constant challenge by increasing your physical and mental well-being.

Benefit: 你选择的两个属性值都增加1点

9级：不屈杀手 Inexorable Slayer

You have gained the resilience to shake off magic, poison, and all the worst effects of your enemies' powers.

Benefit: 你在豁免骰上获得+1加值

10级：辅助威能 Utility Power

As you reach the apex of the heroic tier, your skill training grants you a singular advantage on the battlefield.

Benefit: 你获得1个10级或更低级的战士辅助威能

总经验值等级已知专长职业特性和威能
